sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — SEO Decision Engine — close the data→decision gap (8-phase program)
sprints.rationale: From the 2026-06-23 15-agent SEO audit (overall C, 'A-grade architecture wired to a C-grade decision surface'). Group A flips loops already built; Group B fixes geo correctness + adds a cost-governed foundation; Group C adds paid capabilities. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-23-seo-decision-engine-design.md. Deferred items (status: deferred) are out-of-program backlog captured so nothing is lost.

items.title: P1 — Flip keyword-value-scoring on + delete crude Hub-sort path (one PR). Keep computeOpportunityScore as gate-failure/backfill fallback.
items.notes: Done (2026-06-24). Retired the keyword-value-scoring flag; value-first scoring is unconditional. Crude Hub-sort accessors deleted; computeOpportunityScore kept as the gate-failure/backfill/projection fallback. 7 test files updated; pr-check anti-reintroduction guard added + deprecation registry advanced (hidden→removed, keyword-universe-full added as the hidden exemplar). PR to staging; staging eyeball of admin Hub + client Strategy ordering before main.

items.title: P2 — Effort priors: thread getEffortPriorDays (measured time-to-implement) into the 16 OV scorer calls, overriding DEFAULT_EFFORT_DAYS. Calibration-basis swap deferred to GA4 revenue grounding.
items.notes: Done (2026-06-24). Effort-priors only: getEffortPriorDays threaded per-actionType into all 16 computeOpportunityValue inputs via an effortDaysFor(type, source) helper. Inert until >=3 measured outcomes of an action type accrue (then falls back to DEFAULT_EFFORT_DAYS, byte-identical). The realized/predicted calibration-BASIS swap was DEFERRED (owner decision 2026-06-24): ov-calibration.ts deliberately gates the basis flip on GA4 estimatedRevenue (attributed_value is a CPC proxy today), and this program also deferred GA4 grounding. Basis flip now rides with seo-engine-deferred-revenue-grounding.

items.title: P3 — Surface AI-Overview/SERP-feature triggers from ranked_keywords serp_item_types into SerpFeatures type + content-brief AEO directive + scoring
items.notes: Done (2026-06-24). ai_overview recognized in hasSerpOpportunity (string label from ranked_keywords serp_item_types), pushed into stored serpFeatures at both enrichment build sites, added to the SerpFeatures intelligence type + seo-context aggregation + AI-context formatter + countSerpOpportunities (client serpOpportunities), a content-brief AI-Overview AEO directive, and the ContentGapRow chip maps (descriptive/plain/emoji) + ordered set. Free signal = 'this keyword triggers an AI Overview', NOT 'are we cited' (the paid P6 national-SERP fetch). Zero new credits. Brief directive is prompt-only by design (shapes the visible AI-generated brief).

items.title: P4 — Geo correctness: thread location/language through domain endpoints + workspace target-geo field (migration) + resolveWorkspaceTargetGeo()
items.notes: DONE 2026-06-24. Flag `geo-targeting` (OFF = byte-identical, incl. legacy un-versioned domain cache key via domainGeoToken — no re-warm). Interface + all 6 domain methods thread locationCode/languageCode; migration 152 target_geo column + TargetGeo type + workspaces.ts lockstep + PATCH boundary + toAdminWorkspaceView serializer + resolveWorkspaceTargetGeo() (field→local primary market→US/en). 12 caller sites threaded via workspaceProviderGeo() gate (competitor calls use CLIENT geo; backlinks excluded; getKeywordsForKeywords has no live caller yet). Admin BusinessFootprint TargetGeoEditor (curated DataForSEO country list = 2000+ISO numeric) gated behind flag. Tests: provider body/cache-key (4), PATCH boundary (3), row-mapper completeness, TargetGeoEditor render (4). Fixes silent US/English corruption for non-US clients (D-grade national/intl dimension).

items.title: P5 — Reliability + cost: retry/backoff, activate dead markCapabilityDisabled, credit-usage read path + assertCreditBudget per-tier gate
items.notes: DONE 2026-06-24. (1) Bounded retry-with-backoff in external-fetch.ts for transient 429/500/502/503/504 + network (default 2 retries on fetchProviderJson; 402/401/4xx/timeout never retried) — transient errors no longer collapse to []/null. (2) Activated the dead markCapabilityDisabled: a 40204 on backlinks now trips a 6h in-memory breaker + removed the `capability !== 'backlinks'` guard so getBacklinksProvider short-circuits to null (callers degrade). (3) NEW server/credit-budget-gate.ts: CREDIT_BUDGETS {free:0, growth:2000, premium:Infinity} + evaluateCreditBudget + assertCreditBudget cross-phase contract (P6-P8 call at route entry). Owner decision: OBSERVE-ONLY launch (budgetEnforcementEnabled=false; assertCreditBudget logs would-block, never throws; flip one let to hard-enforce). (4) Health card quotaStatus now reflects MTD budget vs usage; (5) AIUsageSection surfaces the served-but-dark dataforseo/dataforseoDaily (credits/calls/cache-hit-rate + daily chart). DEVIATIONS from audit: U4 (provider-internal gate call) reverted — created a heavy provider→gate→workspaces import cycle that broke provider tests; gating belongs at P6-P8 route entry per the audit's own contract note. U7 (NotificationBell budget-blocked) deferred — observe-only means no blocks happen yet; CreditBudgetError contract is ready for the enforcement flip. Tests: retry (7), budget-gate (12), capability-breaker (8); updated seo-provider-routing + local-visibility for the new behaviors. No feature flag (reliability/cost infra).

items.title: P6 — National advanced-SERP rank + AI-Overview citation layer: new job, true rank + features, serp_feature_opportunity insight, historical backfill
items.notes: DONE 2026-06-24. Flag national-serp-tracking (SEO Decision Engine group; OFF=byte-identical). Built fixture-grounded U0-U8. (U0) migration 153 serp_snapshots — true SERP rank + features time series (position/matched_url NULLable; parallel to GSC rank_snapshots, joined on (ws,date,query), never conflated); KeywordCommandCenterMetrics +nationalPosition/matchedUrl/serpFeatures/aiOverviewCited/aiOverviewPresent (ADDITIVE — never overrides GSC currentPosition, so value-score/skinny-replay invariant holds); serp_feature_opportunity 7-part insight lockstep; NationalSerpProviderRequest/Result + optional getNationalSerp. (U1) parseNationalSerp pure+fixture-validated (rank_group among type==='organic' only for client rank; aggregated top-level references[].domain for AI-Overview citation; www-strip domain match) + getNationalSerp reusing runDataForSeoOperation/cache168h/credit-logging. (U2) serp-snapshots-store (tri-state mapper, parseJsonSafeArray, transaction upsert, keywordComparisonKey-normalized query). (U3) runNationalSerpRefreshJob ported from runLocalSeoRefreshJob (concurrency=1 global+per-ws hasActiveJob, memory headroom, cancel checks, INCREMENTAL flush so cancel keeps paid reads) + POST /api/rank-tracking/:ws/refresh-national gated flag→Growth+ tier→observe-only assertCreditBudget→serialization; 100-kw cap; target-geo (P4) threaded. (U4) computeSerpFeatureOpportunities fires ONLY on the ownership-guarded AI-Overview-uncited signal (featured-snippet trigger dropped after review — parser has presence not ownership; capture deferred to P7); deleteStaleInsightsByType unconditional (bridge rule). (U2b) admin metrics overlay in keyword-command-center. (client) serp_feature_opportunity narrative projector ('Google's AI Overview is answering X without citing you'). (U6) KeywordDetailDrawer live-SERP rank + ranking URL + serpBadges (extracted to shared/serpFeatureBadges) + AI-Overview citation badge emerald(cited)/zinc(not), never purple; flag-gated 'Refresh national ranks' Hub button. WS_EVENTS.SERP_SNAPSHOTS_REFRESHED (server broadcast + centralized useWsInvalidation + KeywordHub handler + platform-domain-event + background-job-matrix registrations). Client metrics admin-only (no public-portal serializer); client sees only the insight narrative. DEVIATIONS from audit: nationalPosition is a SEPARATE field (not a currentPosition override) to preserve the value-score invariant; 'public serialization of metrics' was N/A (no public command-center endpoint) — the client surface is the insight narrative instead; historical backfill stays deferred (owner decision). Scaled multi-agent review (4 reviewers): security + compliance clean; fixed 2 Important (snippet false-positive, cancel-discards-batch) + 2 Minor. Tests: parser(5)+store(6)+narrative(2)+drawer(2)+route integration(4); full unit 14129 / component 4123 / contract 1401 green.

items.title: P7 — GBP + reviews local layer: business_listings_search + capture ratings → review-gap recs
items.notes: DONE 2026-06-24. Flag local-gbp (SEO Decision Engine group; PAID surface OFF=byte-identical). FREE+PAID (audit-validated split). FREE half (unflagged, P3 precedent): parseListingRating extracts rating.value/votes_count from local_pack items the local refresh already fetches — populates LocalVisibilityBusinessResult.rating/reviewCount ($0). PAID half: getBusinessListings (business_data/business_listings_search, reuses runDataForSeoOperation/cache24h/credit-breaker) — category search (competitors, sorted by votes_count) + TITLE search (the owner, who's often too review-poor to surface in a count-sorted search); migration 154 business_listing_snapshots (own + competitors via is_owned; rating/review_count NULLable, zero reviews = absent never 0); business-listings-store. local-gbp-refresh job (ported from national-serp: serialization, memory, cancel, incremental flush; owner assigned by parser-VERIFIED isOwned, not result[0]) + POST /api/local-seo/:ws/refresh-gbp gated flag→Growth+→observe-only budget→serialization. DELIVERABLE: review-gap + GBP-completeness RECOMMENDATIONS (reuse local_visibility RecType, no new insight) — review-gap (count≥10 OR star≥0.3 vs top competitor with real review count) + GBP-completeness (profile richness <60/100; claim-status intentionally NOT a trigger — is_claimed defaults true so unclaimed owners aren't returned). Admin GbpReviewsPanel (reviews-vs-competitors blue, completeness scoreColorClass, aggregates only, never purple) + GET /api/local-seo/:ws/gbp-reviews + LocalSeoSlice.reviewSummary (AI context). WS LOCAL_GBP_SNAPSHOTS_REFRESHED full registry lockstep. DEVIATIONS: getBusinessListings gained optional title (owner lookup); shared deriveGbpCompletenessScore (parser + recs); 'claimed' reframed to profile-completeness after scaled review found it never reliably false. Scaled 4-agent review: security + PII clean (no review text/authors/contact_info captured); fixed 3 Important (dead unclaimed branches, owner name-collision, missing panel invalidation key) + 2 Minor. Tests: listing-rating(5)+parser(6)+store(9)+recs(2)+panel(3)+slice+route integration(4); full unit 14151 / component 4126 / contract green.

items.title: P8 — AI-visibility slice: ai_optimization/llm_mentions_* → 'are we cited by LLMs' KPI + AEO before/after proof
items.notes: DONE 2026-06-24 — FINAL phase of the SEO Decision Engine program. Flag ai-visibility (SEO Decision Engine group; OFF=byte-identical). Mentions-DB only (no direct prompting); KPI-only deliverable (no new rec/insight — the existing aeo-* recs are the actions). getLlmMentions provider (ai_optimization/llm_mentions/aggregated_metrics, reuses runDataForSeoOperation/cache336h/40204-breaker; VERIFY-ON-LIVE note on the exact REST envelope — response shape is fixture-validated) + parseLlmMentions. Migration 155 llm_mention_snapshots (time-series; mentions/ai_search_volume NULLable → absent=0 never invented). HEADLINE = share-of-voice (client BRAND ÷ all co-mentioned brand_entities_title, like-to-like) — distinct from mention VOLUME (domain citations). llm-mentions-refresh job (ported national-serp pattern; resolves ownerBrandNames from workspace.name + domain-root fallback) + POST /api/rank-tracking/:ws/refresh-ai-visibility + GET .../ai-visibility, gated flag→Growth+→observe-only budget→serialization. Admin AiVisibilityPanel (share-of-voice MetricRing, mention volume, mentions-over-time trend sparkline = before/after proof, competitor share-of-voice, source-domain AEO targets; blue data/score colors, never purple) mounted in KeywordHub. SeoContextSlice.aiVisibility → AdminChat/AI context. WS LLM_MENTIONS_SNAPSHOTS_REFRESHED full registry lockstep. DEVIATIONS: route under /api/rank-tracking (existing registered group, not /api/strategy); CLIENT-facing KPI deferred (see seo-engine-followon-ai-visibility-client-kpi) — it needs accrued snapshots to be a meaningful before/after. Scaled 4-agent review: security + PII + compliance clean (no LLM transcripts captured — aggregates only); fixed 3 Important (all share-of-voice: 'not measured' undefined vs misleading 0%, over-matching brand matcher, blank-name degradation). Tests: parser(13)+store(7)+panel(4)+route integration(5); full unit 14170 / component 4129 / contract 1401 green. SEO Decision Engine P1-P8 COMPLETE.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — The Issue (Client) — Verdict-First Trust Spine
sprints.rationale: Invert the client The Issue dashboard from a 0-100 vanity-ring/content-plan hero into a verdict-first trust spine that leads with a dollarized, baseline-anchored, GA4-grounded outcome verdict. P0 = the trust spine on GA4 estimates (verdict + outcome count + money frame, baseline-anchored to workspace.createdAt, eventConfig-pinned), shipped behind the-issue-client-spine master flag (OFF = byte-identical). P1 = reconciliation/return-hook/segment-inserts/next-bets, declared OFF and deferred until P0 is merged + green on staging.

items.title: The Issue (Client) P1 — return hook (forwardable one-pager export [P1b] + event-driven EMAIL pull-back [P1c]; NO SMS)
items.notes: Flag: the-issue-client-return-hook (declared OFF, staging-validation rollout to watch delivery cost first). [P1b BUILT + review-fixed 2026-06-20] docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-20-the-issue-client-p1b-plan.md — admin setup-readiness checklist (IssueSetupReadiness) + admin/client named-leads + forwardable one-pager export (print-from-browser, NO PDF lib); D7 PII boundary held; 12-finding scaled review all fixed (1 Important + 7 Minor). See FEATURE_AUDIT #531. [P1c BUILT + PR-READY 2026-06-20] docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-20-the-issue-client-p1c-plan.md — EMAIL-ONLY (no SMS, owner-locked) weekly event-gated return-hook: a new weekly cron (server/return-hook-cron.ts, clone of strategy-issue-cron) sends ONE consolidated client_return_hook digest (new customers/leads + new measured money + decision-still-waiting) ONLY when ≥1 section has content, through the EXISTING email stack (nodemailer queue + throttle-exempt 'return' category — the ISO-week marker, stamped only on a confirmed enqueue, is the authoritative cap — + workspace_primary recipient policy). Additive — no new transport built (7-area infra discovery confirmed it exists). Owner decisions: weekly digest only-when-something-happened; match-existing opt-out + 'reply to stop' footer (platform-wide preference center deferred → email-preference-center). Migration 151 (last_return_hook_sent_week_of weekly marker). Money section activity-gated (only on new-leads-this-week + measured_action verdict). 19 new tests; full suite 26806 green; flag-OFF byte-identical. See FEATURE_AUDIT #532. Status stays pending until ALL of P1 is soaked on staging + the legacy-cutover/teardown (owner-locked sequence: build all P1 → one soak + cutover at the end). || [DELTA AUDIT 2026-06-24 · already-done]: both halves built + flag-gated — P1b one-pager export + P1c email pull-back via return-hook-cron.ts (idempotency mig 151). Residual is staging-soak + cutover gate, not unbuilt code.

items.notes: Done 2026-06-16 (PR #1248): 1064->~350 line orchestrator; 5 hooks + 11 leaves; behavior-preserving; 16-file scaled review; 25,832 tests green.

Flag OFF = byte-identical legacy layout. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-16-strategy-redesign-phase-1a-ia-scaffold.md.

OpportunitiesList merges Quick Wins + Low-Hanging Fruit (dedup by pagePath) with per-row Optimize-page CTAs; StrategyDiff migrated to useQuery (refetches on strategy:updated) with navigating nextAction CTAs (watch/review_evidence stay passive); new DecayingPagesCard (useContentDecay) + LostQueryRecoveryCard (useLostVisibility). items.title: Phase 3a — Cannibalization triage UI + Fix-in-Editor CTA (read-only)
items.notes: Done 2026-06-16 (PR #1252, merged to staging). New CannibalizationTriage leaf replaces the passive CannibalizationAlert in the bands Act band only (legacy + ContentPipeline keep CannibalizationAlert). Per issue: keeper page marked (canonicalPath or best position), each duplicate gets a Fix-in-editor CTA → seo-editor prefilled by pageSlug. Relaxed the SEO-editor prefill gate (useSeoEditorSessionState) to fire on pageId||pageSlug (slug-fallback match already existed; also fixes latent no-prefill for PageIntelligence + DeadLinkPanel). Review caught + fixed a once-per-mount guard that blocked the 2nd Fix-in-editor (keyed to lastFixKey). Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-16-strategy-redesign-phase-3a-cannibalization-triage.md.

items.title: Phase 3b-i — Cannibalization Mark-resolved + resolved re-filter (admin-only)
items.notes: Done 2026-06-16 (PR #1254, merged to staging). Per-issue 'Mark resolved' in CannibalizationTriage records the existing cannibalization_resolved outcome (durable tracked_action, sourceType 'cannibalization', sourceId=normalized keyword); resolved issues drop out of the queue (read via useOutcomeActions, refetched by the global OUTCOME_ACTION_RECORDED invalidation). Fixed the stale actionTypeEnum (server/schemas/outcome-schemas.ts) which omitted cannibalization_resolved + 4 others. New: outcomesApi.recordAction, useRecordOutcomeAction, cannibalizationSourceId helper. No migration, no strategy-GET change. Review found zero issues. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-16-strategy-redesign-phase-3b-i-cannibalization-mark-resolved.md.

items.title: Phase 4a — Reference band: Authority & Backlinks merge + BacklinkProfile RQ migration + competitor invalidation/cache-label fixes
items.notes: Done 2026-06-16 (PR #1257, merged to staging). First of three Phase 4 sub-PRs (4a/4b/4c). New AuthorityAndBacklinks leaf merges the Reference band's backlink + competitive children into one: composes BacklinkProfile + CompetitiveIntel variant='merged' (hides the own-domain stat grid + the embedded Keyword Gaps section, deduped; corrected cache-freshness label). BacklinkProfile migrated off raw useState+useEffect+fetch to a new useBacklinkProfile React Query hook (queryKeys.admin.backlinkProfile) — the last hand-rolled fetch in src/components/strategy/. Fixed the STRATEGY_UPDATED→competitorIntel invalidation gap (added backlinkProfile + competitorIntelAll to strategyMutationKeys) and the wrong 48h staleTime/cache-label (real DataForSEO TTL is 7d). Bands Reference band only; legacy layout byte-identical (CompetitiveIntel variant defaults to 'full'; flag NOT removed). Review: zero Critical/Important. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-16-strategy-redesign-phase-4-reference-consolidation.md.

items.title: Phase 4b — Reference band: Competitor Evidence inline Track + Site Keywords→Hub deep-link + Opportunities Explore-in-Hub
items.notes: Done 2026-06-16 (PR #1259, merged to staging). Second of three Phase 4 sub-PRs. KeywordGaps (the 'Raw Competitor Evidence' surface) gains an OPTIONAL inline Track button (gated showTrack=!!onTrack; keyed Fragment keeps the no-track legacy row byte-identical) and MOVES from the bands Act band to the bands Reference band as the single deduped competitor-evidence surface (the embedded gaps in CompetitiveIntel were already dropped in 4a's merged variant). New ManageInHubCard replaces the full SiteTargetKeywords list in the bands Reference band with a compact 'Manage in Keyword Hub' deep-link (literal ?tab=in_strategy → two-halves contract honored by KeywordHub). KeywordOpportunities gains an OPTIONAL per-row 'Explore in Hub' deep-link (freeform AI prose → Hub research, NOT auto-Track which would pollute rank tracking). All three via NEW bands-only realLeaves keys (competitorEvidence/manageInHub/opportunitiesInteractive); legacy keeps keywordGaps/siteKeywords/opportunities byte-identical. Review: APPROVE, zero Critical/Important. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-16-strategy-redesign-phase-4-reference-consolidation.md.

items.title: Phase 4c — Reference band: compact StatBar + RankingDistribution click-to-Hub + Guide→help disclosure
items.notes: Done 2026-06-16 (PR #1260, merged to staging). ✅ PHASE 4 COMPLETE (4a+4b+4c). Third of three Phase 4 sub-PRs. New StrategyStatBar (CompactStatBar) replaces the hero StrategyStatGrid in the bands Reference band. RankingDistribution's 11–20 (striking-distance) legend row becomes a Hub deep-link (literal ?tab=striking_distance) — required fixing keywordHubDeepLink.HUB_SEGMENT_VALUES which had OMITTED striking_distance (a segment the Hub receiver honors → the sender was silently dropping it; sender==receiver restored + 'SIX'→'SEVEN' doc). New StrategyHelpDisclosure (collapsed, mirrors StrategySettings) consolidates StrategyHowItWorks + the exported METRIC_GLOSSARY and drops the stale 'Rank Tracker' reference; it replaces the howItWorks slot at the foot of the bands Reference band. Guide demotion: the top-level Analysis/Guide TabBar is now FLAG-CONDITIONAL (flag-on returns bandsAnalysis directly, no TabBar/Guide tab; flag-off renders the unchanged TabBar+Guide+legacyAnalysis — byte-identical). New bands-only realLeaves keys statBar/distributionInteractive/helpDisclosure; legacy keeps statGrid/distribution/howItWorks. NOTE: the spec's orphaned-ActionQueue dead-code delete was SPUN OFF to its own task (task_44eefd6b) — it touches the inbox bounded context + shared wsInvalidation + platform-org report (~10 files), scope-bleed for a Reference-band IA PR. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-16-strategy-redesign-phase-4-reference-consolidation.md.

items.title: Phase 5a — strategy_history snapshot on manual PATCH (What Changed misattribution fix)
items.notes: Done 2026-06-17 (PR #1262, merged to staging). First of three Phase 5 sub-PRs. The manual PATCH strategy-edit path (routes/keyword-strategy.ts) did NOT snapshot strategy_history (only the AI-regen writeKeywordStrategy did), so StrategyDiff ('What Changed') misattributed human edits to the last AI regeneration. Extracted the snapshot INSERT+prune-to-5 from keyword-strategy-persistence.ts into a reusable snapshotStrategyHistory(workspaceId, previousStrategy, priorArrays) helper (guards on prior generatedAt; must run inside db.transaction BEFORE the replaceAll/upsert clobber). Called it at the top of the PATCH applyPatch transaction (reads prior table-backed arrays + uses the PRIOR generatedAt). Behavior-preserving refactor of the regen path. Integration test: PATCH-then-/diff attributes the edit to the new boundary; no-blob PATCH records no snapshot (guard). Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-17-strategy-redesign-phase-5-signal-generation.md (decisions: cron conservative+kill-switch behind signal-auto-recompute flag; on-mutation always-enqueue).

items.title: Phase 5b — Recompute job + manual 'Recompute now' + 'Computed X ago' caption
items.notes: Done 2026-06-17 (PR #1263, merged to staging). Second of three Phase 5 sub-PRs (always-on, no flag). New INTELLIGENCE_RECOMPUTE background job type (BACKGROUND_JOB_TYPES + metadata; resultBehavior domain-store; FM-2 transitions verified) + worker server/intelligence-recompute-job.ts (getOrComputeInsights force:true — computeAndPersistInsights stays private; NO addActivity, to avoid self-perpetuating 5c's activity-gated cron). New POST /api/webflow/keyword-strategy/:ws/signals/recompute (hasActiveJob reuse-or-create → createJob → setTimeout worker → {jobId}; recommendations.ts template). Threaded computedAt (MAX insight computed_at) onto the /signals payload (all 3 return branches) + SignalsResponse. IntelligenceSignals card: 'Computed X ago' muted caption (timeAgo) + teal 'Recompute now' Button (variant=link) in the SectionCard action slot, wired via useRecomputeSignals (POST → trackJob; NotificationBell surfaces progress; the existing INTELLIGENCE_SIGNALS_UPDATED broadcast auto-invalidates — no 2nd broadcast). Worker FM-2 + component tests. LESSON: adding to BACKGROUND_JOB_TYPES requires a lockstep entry in tests/helpers/background-job-test-matrix.ts (BACKGROUND_JOB_LIFECYCLE_MATRIX) or background-job-coverage-contract fails. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-17-strategy-redesign-phase-5-signal-generation.md.

items.title: Cannibalization triage — operator-selectable keeper (override the auto-derived canonical page)
items.notes: Phase 3 follow-on. Today CannibalizationTriage auto-derives the keeper page (item.canonicalPath if set, else best-ranking via keeperPathOf). Owner wants to OVERRIDE which competing page is the keeper (real example: keep a keyword on a services page, not the auto-picked insights page). Scope: a per-issue keeper picker; the chosen keeper must flow into (a) which pages show 'Fix in editor' (non-keepers = duplicates), and (b) the Send-to-client payload canonicalPath. KEY CONSTRAINT: the override MUST persist across strategy regeneration — cannibalization_issues is delete-then-reinsert (replaceAllCannibalizationIssues clobbers canonical_path), so the operator's keeper choice can't live on that row. Store it durably keyed by normalized keyword (mirror the 3b-i resolution pattern: a tracked record / small override table / preserved-metadata Map on the delete-reinsert), and have keeperPathOf prefer the operator override over the auto-derivation. Do after the current Strategy redesign batch. Owner expects further refinements to surface as Strategy gets exercised. || [DELTA AUDIT 2026-06-24 · already-done]: fully built — mig 141 cannibalization_keeper_override keyed on order-independent url_set_key (clobber-immune), applied at the read boundary (cannibalization-issues.ts:176), UI KeeperSelector.tsx. The durable-key design satisfies the regen-persistence constraint.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Strategy v3 — Curation Cockpit + Curated Client Delivery
sprints.rationale: Turn the admin Strategy page into a curation cockpit (operator triages system recommendations and curates a handful to clients) and the client dashboard into a curated 'Recommended this month' delivery surface. Recommendations gain a client-facing lifecycle (clientStatus) on a separate axis from the internal RecStatus. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-18-strategy-v3-curation-cockpit-design.md; plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-18-strategy-v3-curation-cockpit.md.

items.title: Strategy redesign Phase 3 — managed keyword working set (add/remove/keep/replenish)
items.notes: Gated behind the strategy-keywords-managed-set child flag (default OFF, declared in the P2 pre-commit). Dedicated strategy_keyword_set table (migration 139) whose SOLE writer is reconcileStrategyKeywordSet, grafted into persistKeywordStrategy's writeKeywordStrategy transaction (NOT saveRecommendations, which has no db.transaction) — the one storage design provably immune to the tracked_keywords delete-then-reinsert clobber. items.title: Strategy redesign Phase 4 — fold Intelligence Signals into the cockpit as real recs
items.notes: Done 2026-06-19 (PR #1286, P4 Wave 1 Lane A). Gated behind the strategy-signal-fold child flag (default OFF). Mints Intelligence Signals as real recs at strategy-gen time (mintSignalRecs inside generateRecommendations, AFTER carry-over) so the existing RECOMMENDATIONS_UPDATED broadcast + applyLifecycleCarryOver cover folded signals automatically; dedup via signal:<insightId> merge key. CRITICAL fix (caught in review): signal-sourced recs are exempted from the auto-resolve sweep — their producer never re-emits them, so 'absent from newSources' is always a false positive; without the exemption every un-actioned folded signal flipped to '✓ Auto-resolved' on the next daily/on-mutation recompute. Guarded by a status-continuity regression test (server/__tests__/signal-fold-carry-over.test.ts). Carry-over confirmed O(n). flag-OFF keeps the standalone IntelligenceSignals card (deletion deferred to the strategy-command-center cutover). sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — 🧭 Platform Simplification — Parallel Explorer Recommendations
sprints.rationale: Six read-only parallel explorers audited the platform for behavior-preserving simplification opportunities: server domain shape, intelligence slices, frontend data flow, stacked feature surfaces, integration adapters, and test/guardrail leverage. This sprint captures those findings as a pick-up-ready backlog. The goal is not to remove functionality or pursue a broad rewrite; it is to make existing platform concepts more canonical by consolidating repeated lifecycle logic, cache invalidation, prompt assembly, provider transport, and guardrail patterns behind the conventions the codebase already uses.

items.title: Feature stack — keyword admin cutover and legacy shell retirement
items.source: Parallel simplification explorer audit 2026-06-09 — Feature Stack Simplification
items.notes: Audit update 2026-06-10: this is no longer a table/data-model unification item. The backend read model is already canonical through the Keyword Command Center routes/hooks, and the remaining work is admin-surface cutover + authority cleanup. Current state: `seo-keywords` already flag-switches between `KeywordHub` and legacy `KeywordCommandCenter`, `seo-ranks` already redirects into the Hub when the flag is on, and both Hub + KCC read the same KCC summary/rows/detail APIs. Remaining live duplication: `KeywordHub` and `KeywordCommandCenter` both still own search/deep-link/drawer/bulk-action UI concerns, and standalone `RankTracker` is still a writable surface (add/remove/pin/snapshot), not measurement-only yet. Safe follow-up scope: remove duplicated Hub-local websocket invalidation in favor of the shared admin invalidation registry, align rank-tracking route/error-contract and action-metadata drift with the KCC/Hub contract, extract one shared rank-tracking mutation/invalidation authority used by Hub/RankTracker/Strategy, then retire the flag-off `KeywordCommandCenter` shell and writable standalone `RankTracker` behavior only after parity is confirmed. Preserve keyword lifecycle actions, rank history, snapshot capture, pinned trends, strategy feedback, View-in-Hub deep links, and local SEO segments. Tests/guardrails: `KeywordHub.test.tsx`, `KeywordCommandCenterDeepLink.test.tsx`, `RankTracker.test.tsx`, rank/KCC route tests, `route-fold-in-seo-ranks`, shared-cache coherence tests, and a contract that `RANK_TRACKING_UPDATED` invalidates Hub, latest/history ranks, strategy, and client rank reads. | Admin surface audit 2026-06-11 (§7): HARD PRECONDITION — port LocalSeoVisibilityPanel mode=keywords + market-setup drawer entry into the Hub before flipping (KCC is their only keyword-mode mount; KeywordCommandCenter.tsx:433-450). Flag-ON blockers + cutover sequencing: docs/audits/2026-06-11-admin-surface-remediation-plan.md §Wave 4. | W4 Phase A complete (fix/keyword-hub-cutover-a): panel+KPIs+summary error ported, drawer pin/outcome/replaced-by/history-chart, UX blockers (filter reset, keepPreviousData, mobile, empty states, bulk clearance), redirect search-preservation, view_rankings repoint. | DONE 2026-06-11 (Keyword Hub cutover, fix/keyword-hub-cutover-c stacked on Phase B). Phase B flipped keyword-hub default to true; Phase C stripped the legacy stack: deleted KeywordCommandCenter.tsx + KCC-only subcomponents (KeywordRow/VariantSubRow) + RankTracker.tsx and their tests; folded seo-ranks into the Hub (every seo-ranks literal removed from src/; transitional redirect retained). Server: removed the RankTracker-only DELETE /api/rank-tracking/:workspaceId/keywords/:query untrack endpoint (pin endpoint survives; Hub drawer uses it). Flag: keyword-hub retired from FEATURE_FLAGS/catalog/groups + migration 135 drops its overrides; surviving Keyword Hub group keys = keyword-universe-full, keyword-value-scoring. Prevention: pr-check rules `Retired Keyword Hub feature flag key used in flag API` + `Retired seo-ranks route literal in src` (the latter promoted from the route-fold-in-seo-ranks drift test). Docs: keyword-command-center.md -> keyword-hub.md; route-removal-checklist refreshed for registry-driven nav; deprecation-lifecycle entries added (KeywordCommandCenter, RankTracker, seo-ranks -> removed). NEEDS_CONTEXT carried forward: the server full-model path (buildKeywordCommandCenterModel + buildKeywordCommandCenterRowsViaModel, ~1,200 lines) was NOT deleted — it is LIVE via the Hub's `local_candidates` advanced filter (buildKeywordCommandCenterRows dispatches to it; only producer of buildLocalSeoKeywordCandidates). The `includeLocalSeoDetails` branch is the only genuinely-dead sub-path (always passed false). Migrating local_candidates to the skinny path is non-trivial (OOM-guarded) — tracked separately.

items.title: Feature stack — inbox deliverable cleanup and stale wrapper removal
items.source: Parallel simplification explorer audit 2026-06-09 — Feature Stack Simplification
items.notes: Audit update 2026-06-10: this is no longer a 'complete the spine' item. The canonical runtime surface is already `InboxTab` -> `UnifiedInbox` over `ClientDeliverable` + `GET /api/public/deliverables/:workspaceId`; the remaining work is cleanup around that canonical path. Current state: `InboxTab` is already a thin wrapper over `UnifiedInbox`, unified deliverables are the canonical client read model, and deliverable reads are assembled centrally from physical + projected sources. Remaining live seams are intentional hybrid write boundaries: projected copy/content reviews still mutate through their source routes, approval apply now uses canonical `POST /api/public/deliverables/:workspaceId/:id/apply` while delegating to the proven approval-batch apply service (legacy approvals URL remains deprecated compatibility), and schema-plan/client-action/source-specific writes remain source-authoritative with mirror sync. Progress 2026-06-13: deliverable realtime parity is closed for physical mirror families. Approval-batch and client-action mirrors already broadcast `DELIVERABLE_SENT`/`DELIVERABLE_UPDATED`; schema-plan send already broadcasts `DELIVERABLE_SENT` at the route/service seam while schema-plan sync/cancel now broadcasts `DELIVERABLE_UPDATED`; work-order and briefing mirrors now broadcast `DELIVERABLE_SENT` on first mirror and `DELIVERABLE_UPDATED` on re-mirror, with regression coverage. Remaining cleanup scope: shrink `InboxTab`/`ClientDashboard` to the real unified prop contract, update stale dark-launch/cutover comments and tests, and retire or isolate legacy approval/client-action normalizers that no longer have production consumers without removing compatibility routes that are still intentionally authoritative. Preserve Decisions/Reviews/Conversations routing, note-based conversations, inline single-action approval, bulk modal, per-item edits, apply-to-website, projected copy/content reviews, requests, and the work-order track lane. Tests/guardrails: unified inbox read route, deliverables route, projected review route coverage, decision-adapter coverage for the canonical deliverable path, `InboxTab`/`UnifiedInbox` component coverage, approval dual-write tests, edited item propagation, public approval broadcast tests, schema-plan/work-order/briefing broadcast tests, and deliverable websocket subscriber wiring. DONE 2026-06-13: canonical inbox cleanup PR tightened the ClientDashboard/InboxTab test fixture contract to the real UnifiedInbox prop surface, removed stale dark-launch/flag-era comments and test names, and marked the old client_action/approval_batch normalizers as compatibility adapters while preserving their label helpers and all compatibility write/read routes. No product behavior changes; unified deliverables remain the canonical client inbox read path.

The visible payoff of the Wave 1–3 data-model consolidation.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — 🎯 Keyword Value — propagation, money, GSC signals, client display
sprints.rationale: Phase 0–2 of keyword-value-scoring shipped the value-first score into the Hub sort + content-gap spine, but a wiring audit found the new score is still siloed: it does NOT propagate to briefs / content-gen / titles-metas / schema / internal-linking / content-plan / AI-context, and the client briefing actively demotes it (sorts by raw volume). This sprint propagates ONE consistent value score everywhere, turns it into dollars, surfaces the per-keyword GSC data already collected-but-discarded (striking-distance, momentum), and builds the client-facing layer — all additive, reusing signals already in hand, no new data collection.

items.title: Per-keyword GSC breakdown in the AI/seoContext slice (named movers, not counts)
items.notes: Wave 3 (enabling join). seo-context-slice reads full per-keyword GSC (getLatestRanks: position/change/clicks/impressions) then collapses to 'N improved, M declined' before any prompt. Keep a top-N per-keyword breakdown (keyword, position, change, clicks, impressions, valueScore) on RankTrackingSummary so AdminChat + generation-context builders can NAME which keyword moved/gained clicks. Foundation for striking-distance + momentum. || PLACEMENT [new slice enrichment]: seoContext/RankTrackingSummary AI-context (named per-keyword movers into prompts). ranking_mover is already in the insights slice for AI — wire from existing data, keep top-N named breakdown. | DONE 2026-06-13: RankTrackingSummary now carries typed topKeywordMovers from latest rank snapshots (query, current position, signed movement, direction, clicks, impressions, CTR, page metadata, optional valueScore). assembleSeoContext keeps the existing aggregate counts and adds the top eight named movers sorted by absolute movement with impression tie-breaks; formatForPrompt emits compact named examples at standard+ verbosity and omits them in compact mode. valueScore remains optional because getLatestRanks() does not currently compute or join keyword value scoring.

MCP prepare_brief_context now accepts target_keyword + target_page_path, threads pagePath into buildContentGenerationContext for page-specific intelligence, returns the target hints, and prepends a compact Brief Target block only when hints are provided. Content/post generation inherits this through the existing brief context path; no UI, DB, or product-route changes.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Intelligence Quality Consolidation — Recommendations & AI Content
sprints.rationale: Close the root quality gaps in platform insights and AI content generation by joining mature subsystems through the existing intelligence conventions instead of hand-rolling context, scoring, narrative, and evidence handling per feature. The target architecture is: workspace data -> intelligence slices -> shared generation context -> AI operation contract -> deterministic recommendation/story output -> tracked action/outcome -> future intelligence. The remaining keyword work extends this consolidation into a full keyword operating loop: provider source data -> shared keyword intelligence -> strategy/recommendation judgment -> rank-tracking propagation -> content/action follow-through -> outcome feedback.

items.title: Strategy v2 — command-center IA (Orient/Act/Evidence + interior tabs)
items.notes: Merged to staging: Phase R (#1266), Phase 0 (#1267), Phase 1 (Orient, #1268), Phase 2 (Act queue, #1269), Phase 3 (interior ?tab= shell — Overview/Content tabs + Content money page, #1270), Phase 4 (Rankings tab — interactive position distribution moved off Overview + a 'Position movements' summary; deep-links to Keyword Hub, #1271). Phase 4 follow-up: the previousPosition producer landed (FEATURE_AUDIT #518) — page_keywords.previous_position now rotates current→previous on the strategy-refresh write (gated, persistKeywordStrategy only), so the movements card surfaces real data from the 2nd refresh on. Phase 5 (Competitive tab — net-new ShareBar share-of-voice + CompetitiveIntel merged head-to-head + KeywordGaps with a Create-brief CTA + BacklinkProfile, composed in research order; backlink/competitive moved off Overview; orphaned AuthorityAndBacklinks wrapper retired; admin tab ungated, Premium gating deferred to Phase 6) merged to staging (#1272). Phase 6 SPLIT into 6a + 6b for focused PRs: Phase 6a (client-safe visibility score — attach strategyUx.orient to the public GET /api/public/seo-strategy/:id read path; OrientMetrics is money-free by construction so no EMV leak; leak-guard integration test; ungated; FEATURE_AUDIT #520) merged to staging (#1273). Phase 6a follow-up: closed a pre-existing raw-cpc-to-all-tiers exposure on the same public read path — pageMap.cpc (admin/scoring-internal money input) is now server-side tier-gated via computeEffectiveTier(ws) !== 'free' (trial-aware), matching the contentGaps no-raw-cpc convention; the Growth+ Revenue-potential drawer is unaffected (it renders server-computed currentMonthly/upsideMonthly, not raw pageMap.cpc). Code review caught a parallel raw-cpc-as-text leak: the keyword-value-scoring valueReasons page-keyword branch emitted '$X CPC' to all client tiers (missing the exposeCpc:surface==='admin' guard the content-gap branch already had, eecacd4f/#1103); owner decision = raw cpc text is admin-surface-only for every client tier. FEATURE_AUDIT #522. Phase 6b (client StrategyTab reframe — flag branch + section-const refactor → Orient header [StrategyClientOrientHeader] + interior Overview/Content/Rankings/Competitive tabs behind strategy-command-center, flag-OFF byte-identical; reuses existing sections + money flows; Competitive reuses the server-402-gated CompetitorGapsSection [no leak]; legacy ?tab= deep-links bridged via legacyAliases; flag read in ClientDashboard + passed as a prop so StrategyTab stays QueryClient-free; FEATURE_AUDIT #521; 3-reviewer pass caught+fixed a Critical Rules-of-Hooks bug + an Important broken deep-link) merged to staging. DONE 2026-06-18 (Strategy v3 Phase 0 — v2 cutover): deleted legacyAnalysis (admin) + the flag-OFF legacy StrategyTab branch (client); command-center is now the unconditional baseline. commandCenterEnabled prop threading removed (ClientDashboard → StrategyTab); strategy-command-center flag KEPT as v3 umbrella (REUSE — no retirement migration). Orphaned StrategyStatGrid + KeywordStrategyGuide deleted. FEATURE_AUDIT #521 updated.

items.title: useToggleSet adoption sweep + pr-check lock
items.notes: Done 2026-06-13 across PR 3 + PR 4. PR 3 generalized `useToggleSet` for string/number keys, lazy defaults, and empty/unbounded accordion state, then migrated high-confidence expand/collapse surfaces. PR 4 extended the hook with an optional setter for reset/seed cases, migrated the remaining straightforward disclosure and multi-select call sites (sidebar, CMS/SEO editor shells, schema/SEO audit disclosure, strategy/client schema sections, request/asset/keyword/copy selections), and added pr-check guardrail `Hand-rolled Set toggle outside useToggleSet`. The guardrail targets simple `toggle*` functions that clone/check/add/delete Set state, while preserving async operation-state sets, controlled prop selections, range selection, and documented complex side-effect transitions.

items.title: P2 helper consolidation tail
items.notes: (a) Migrate 4 custom relative-time formatters onto `src/lib/timeAgo.ts` (`LlmsTxtGenerator.tsx:25`, `WorkspaceHome.tsx:207`, `client/Briefing/WinsSurface.tsx:30`, `admin/MeetingBrief/BriefHeader.tsx:10`); (b) move status→badge ternaries into `<Badge>`/`<StatusBadge>` or `lib/copyStatusConfig.ts` (`PendingApprovals.tsx:186`, `RankTracker.tsx:507`, `ContentBriefs.tsx:479`, `cms-editor/CmsEditorShellPanels.tsx:163-164`, `brand/BatchGenerationPanel.tsx:98`, `workspace-home/SeoWorkStatus.tsx:40,46`); (c) consolidate `uniq`/`uniqueStrings`/`uniqueSeoTexts`/`uniqueEntities` into `uniqStrings(values, opts)`; (d) collapse `sanitizeForPrompt` duplicates between `briefing-prompt.ts:169` and `helpers.ts:278,294`; (e) introduce typed shape in `shared/types/` for `matchedPage`/`meta` to replace the 8+ `(matchedPage as Record<string, unknown>)` ladder in `server/schema-suggester.ts:692-876`; (f) Lock `callAI()` adoption: delete the stale `// callAnthropic` comment at `server/copy-generation.ts:116` (actual call at line 106 already uses `callAI()`) and add a pr-check rule blocking new direct imports of `callOpenAI`/`callAnthropic` outside `server/ai.ts`. [Rescoped 2026-05-27 — originally proposed as a migration based on stale audit + stale CLAUDE.md note; re-verification confirmed full adoption is already complete, so item now mechanizes the invariant rather than migrating to it.] [PARTIAL 2026-05-27 — Plan C systemic: sub-item (f) callAI dispatcher lock done (pr-check rule "Direct callOpenAI/callAnthropic import outside dispatcher" added; stale comment in copy-generation.ts removed). Sub-items a-e remain: timeAgo migration (4 sites), Badge/StatusBadge ternary consolidation, uniqStrings consolidation, sanitizeForPrompt dedup.] | DONE 2026-06-13: re-audited the live helper tail and closed the remaining active-source items. Existing PRs had already migrated the four relative-time call sites to `timeAgo()` and collapsed briefing prompt sanitization onto `sanitizeInlinePromptText()`. This PR moved the remaining schema entity dedupe helper to shared `dedupeBy()`, added shared `SchemaSourcePageMeta`, updated `fetchPageMeta()` and `schema-suggester` to use typed Webflow timestamp metadata instead of `Record<string, unknown>` casts, and replaced the live `PendingApprovals`/`ContentBriefs` status ternaries with `StatusBadge` registry usage. Other old status examples are current-state non-issues: `BatchGenerationPanel` already delegates job status display to `StatusBadge`, `CmsEditorShellPanels` is send-button progress text rather than a badge/status map, `SeoWorkStatus` is count-stat color mapping, and the stale `RankTracker` target is obsolete because that component has been removed.

items.title: Frontend cache simplification — extract keyword mutation invalidation bundles
items.source: Parallel simplification explorer audit 2026-06-09 — Frontend Data Flow
items.notes: Recommended first PR. Scope: `src/hooks/admin/useKeywordCommandCenter.ts`, `src/hooks/admin/useLocalSeo.ts`, `src/hooks/admin/useOutcomes.ts`, `src/hooks/admin/useCopyPipeline.ts`, `src/hooks/admin/useWorkOrders.ts`, `src/lib/queryKeys.ts`, and existing helper `src/lib/background-job-helpers.ts`. Current complexity: mutations repeat domain cache groups by hand, especially keyword strategy/KCC/rank tracking/intelligence. Behavior-preserving path: add `invalidateMany(queryClient, keys)` plus domain helpers such as `keywordMutationInvalidationKeys(wsId)`, `copyEntryInvalidationKeys(wsId, entryId?)`, `localSeoInvalidationKeys(wsId)`. Start with the KCC/rank-tracking bundle because several mutations share the same invalidation set and recent audit work touched that surface. Do not change event names or query key factories in the first PR. Tests/guardrails: focused QueryClient spy tests proving before/after invalidated keys match; keep `npm run typecheck`, `npx vite build`, and relevant KCC hook/component tests green. || DONE 2026-06-09: added `src/lib/queryInvalidation.ts` with `invalidateMany()` and the exact KCC/rank-tracking/intelligence `keywordMutationInvalidationKeys(wsId)` bundle. Migrated only the three Keyword Command Center mutation success handlers and routed `invalidateQueriesOnJobCompletion()` through the same primitive; did not change event names, query-key factories, local SEO, copy, work-order, or product behavior. Added `tests/unit/query-invalidation.test.ts` plus consumer-level invalidation assertions in `tests/unit/background-job-helpers.test.ts` and `tests/unit/hooks/admin-queries-c.test.tsx` to pin both the shared helper and the rewired hook path. Targeted verification: `npx vitest run tests/unit/query-invalidation.test.ts tests/unit/background-job-helpers.test.ts tests/rank-tracking-key-collapse.test.ts tests/unit/hooks/admin-queries-c.test.tsx`.

items.title: Frontend cache simplification — central event-to-query invalidation registry
items.source: Parallel simplification explorer audit 2026-06-09 — Frontend Data Flow
items.notes: Scope: `src/hooks/useWsInvalidation.ts`, `src/components/ClientDashboard.tsx`, `src/components/client/inbox/UnifiedInbox.tsx`, `src/components/client/ClientCopyReview.tsx`, `src/components/admin/ClientDeliverablesPane.tsx`, `src/lib/queryKeys.ts`, `src/lib/wsEvents.ts`. Current complexity: many websocket handlers repeat `queryClient.invalidateQueries(...)`; client-specific handlers duplicate parts of the central admin invalidation hook while also mixing local UI side effects. Behavior-preserving path: after domain invalidation bundles exist, add a shared registry like `getWorkspaceInvalidationKeys(event, workspaceId, payload, scope)` and have handlers call `invalidateMany`. Keep UI-only websocket behavior local (progress bars, modal state, optimistic notifications). Migrate event-by-event, starting with high-volume events such as `CONTENT_UPDATED`, `STRATEGY_UPDATED`, `COPY_SECTION_UPDATED`, `DELIVERABLE_UPDATED`, and rank/keyword events. Tests/guardrails: unit coverage for event-to-key mapping, keep `tests/integration/broadcast-handler-pairs.test.ts` and `tests/contract/ws-invalidation-coverage.test.ts` green, and add a guardrail that new workspace broadcasts either register invalidation keys or document why they are UI-only. || DONE 2026-06-09: added `src/lib/wsInvalidation.ts` as the shared authority for workspace event → query-key invalidation across five scopes: admin workspace surfaces, client dashboard, client unified inbox, client copy review, and admin deliverables. Migrated the remaining pure invalidation handlers out of `useWsInvalidation.ts` and `ClientDashboard.tsx`, including audit/workspace/page-state, billing subscription, outcome, schema, intelligence, copy, recommendation, briefing, request/approval, and deliverable events, while keeping non-query UI side effects local (for example the client dashboard still refreshes workspace bootstrap state on `WORKSPACE_UPDATED`). Rewired `ClientDeliverablesPane` to the same registry so deliverable broadcasts now use the shared query-key authority on both admin and client surfaces. Replaced brittle source-sniffing tests and line-for-line handler reconstruction with registry-based contract/unit coverage in `tests/unit/wsInvalidationRegistry.test.ts`, `tests/unit/useWsInvalidation-pure.test.ts`, `tests/component/ClientDeliverablesPane.test.tsx`, and the affected contract suites. Verification: focused WS/contract suites, `npm run typecheck`, `npx vite build`, `npm run pr-check`, full `npx vitest run` (1554 files / 24545 tests), `npm run verify:feature-flags`, and `npm run verify:coverage-ratchet`.

items.title: Frontend data hooks — create shared GSC base hook mirroring GA4
items.source: Parallel simplification explorer audit 2026-06-09 — Frontend Data Flow
items.notes: Scope: `src/hooks/shared/useGA4Base.ts`, `src/hooks/admin/useAdminSearch.ts`, `src/hooks/client/useClientSearch.ts`, `src/api/analytics.ts`, `src/lib/queryKeys.ts`. Current complexity: GA4 has a shared base hook while GSC admin/client hooks repeat parallel `useQuery` setup, loading/error aggregation, and metric naming. Behavior-preserving path: add `src/hooks/shared/useGSCBase.ts` with configurable API calls, key factories, metric labels, and optional admin-only dimensions; keep `useAdminSearch` and `useClientSearch` as thin adapters so component call sites do not change. Tests/guardrails: typecheck, admin/client Search tab smoke render, and assertions that query keys remain `queryKeys.admin.gsc(...)` and `queryKeys.client.gsc(...)` rather than new literals. || DONE 2026-06-09: added `src/hooks/shared/useGSCBase.ts` to own the repeated Search Console `useQuery` wiring, while keeping `useAdminSearch` and `useClientSearch` as thin adapters with unchanged signatures, loading/error aggregation, and query-key shapes. Preserved the historical admin `'types'` metric alias and the client date-range key shape exactly through `queryKeys.admin.gsc(...)` / `queryKeys.client.gsc(...)`. Added runtime key-parity assertions in `tests/unit/hooks/admin-queries-b.test.tsx` and `tests/unit/hooks/client-queries.test.tsx`; existing client/admin hook smoke coverage remains green in those suites plus `tests/unit/hooks/client-hooks-extended.test.tsx`. Verification includes `npm run typecheck`, `npx vite build`, `npm run pr-check`, `npm run verify:feature-flags`, `npm run verify:coverage-ratchet`, and full `npx vitest run`.

items.title: Frontend data flow — move remaining component-local data access into hooks/API wrappers
items.source: Parallel simplification explorer audit 2026-06-09 — Frontend Data Flow
items.notes: Scope: `src/components/client/ClientCopyReview.tsx`, `src/components/client/ContentTab.tsx`, `src/components/client/strategy/useStrategyTrackedKeywords.ts`, `src/components/page-intelligence/usePageIntelligenceKeywordTracking.ts`, `src/hooks/useFeatureFlag.ts`, and matching `src/api/*` wrappers. Current complexity: a few components/hooks still define inline API helpers, direct `fetch()`, or manual loading state instead of React Query and typed API wrappers. Behavior-preserving path: add typed wrappers for public copy review, text exports, feature flags, and tracked keyword reads; move client copy review queries/mutations to `src/hooks/client/`; convert tracked keyword loaders to React Query-backed hooks. Split into two PRs: copy/export wrappers first, tracked keyword hooks second. Tests/guardrails: client copy review interaction tests, strategy/page intelligence tracking smoke tests, and a post-PR `rg "fetch\(" src/components src/hooks` review with intentional exceptions documented. || DONE 2026-06-09: added typed `publicCopyReview`, `publicContent.exportBrief`, and `featureFlags.list` wrappers; moved `ClientCopyReview` list/section reads onto `useClientCopyEntryList()` / `useClientCopySections()`; rewired `ContentTab` brief export away from inline `fetch()`; converted `useFeatureFlag`, `useStrategyTrackedKeywords`, and `usePageIntelligenceKeywordTracking` to shared API + React Query-backed loading while preserving consumer-facing return shapes and immediate track/add/remove UX via cache updates. Added focused parity coverage in `tests/unit/hooks/tracked-keyword-hooks.test.tsx`, `tests/unit/hooks/root-hooks.test.tsx`, `tests/unit/api-modules-a.test.ts`, `tests/unit/api-modules-b.test.ts`, `tests/unit/queryKeys-coverage.test.ts`, `tests/component/ClientCopyReviewSolo.test.tsx`, `tests/contract/client-strategy-tab-split.test.ts`, `tests/unit/page-intelligence-page-list.test.ts`, and `tests/component/client/StrategyTab.test.tsx`. Verification: targeted suites above plus `npm run typecheck`, `npx vite build`, `npm run pr-check`, `npm run verify:feature-flags`, and `npm run verify:coverage-ratchet`. Full `npx vitest run` remains blocked by unrelated existing failures in broader contract/integration suites (for example `tests/contract/intelligence-slice-population.test.ts`, `tests/contract/admin-client-parity-cluster.test.ts`, `tests/contract/old-vs-new-output.test.ts`, `tests/integration/client-auth-full.test.ts`, and an `EADDRINUSE` collision on port `13881`).

items.title: Frontend query keys — tighten factory coverage for prefix keys and variants

items.notes: Scope: `src/lib/queryKeys.ts`, `src/hooks/useWsInvalidation.ts`, `src/components/ClientDashboard.tsx`, `src/hooks/admin/useOutcomes.ts`, `src/hooks/admin/useLocalSeo.ts`. Current complexity: most keys are centralized, but some prefix/variant keys are still assembled ad hoc with array literals/spreads. Behavior-preserving path: add explicit factories such as `admin.blueprintAll(wsId)`, `admin.blueprintVersionsAll(wsId)`, `client.postPreviewAll(wsId)`, `admin.outcomeAction(wsId, actionId)`, `admin.outcomeActionsFiltered(wsId, type, score)`, and `admin.localSeoVariant(wsId, includeSnapshots)`. Migrate one domain at a time. Tests/guardrails: typecheck/build; static grep for `queryKey: [` after migration; consider a pr-check warning that literal query-key arrays require a `querykey-ok` reason unless they are inside `queryKeys.ts`. || DONE 2026-06-09: added exact query-key factories for blueprint prefix invalidation, client post-preview prefix invalidation, outcome action/filter variants, and local SEO summary/snapshot variants. Migrated only the matching listed call sites so cache keys remain byte-for-byte compatible with the former literals/spreads. Added parity coverage in `tests/unit/queryKeys-coverage.test.ts` for legacy key shapes and prefix/detail relationships. Targeted verification: `npx vitest run tests/unit/queryKeys-coverage.test.ts`.

items.title: Integration adapters — introduce a shared Google provider transport wrapper
items.source: Parallel simplification explorer audit 2026-06-09 — Integration Adapters
items.notes: Scope: `server/google-analytics.ts`, `server/search-console.ts`, `server/google-auth.ts`, routes under `server/routes/google.ts`, and Google-related tests. Current complexity: GA4, GSC, and OAuth helpers use separate raw `fetch()` behavior, different timeout handling, and inconsistent provider error envelopes; DataForSEO has stronger centralized transport patterns by comparison. Behavior-preserving path: add `server/google-provider-client.ts` with `googleJson<T>()`, timeout support, sanitized provider error classification, token refresh integration where appropriate, and an explicit degraded/null policy for quota-sensitive reads. Keep existing exported functions and route response shapes stable in the first PR; migrate GA4 read calls first, then GSC query/inspection calls, then OAuth exchange/refresh if it fits. Tests/guardrails: `tests/unit/google-auth.test.ts`, `tests/unit/google-analytics-pure.test.ts`, `tests/unit/gsc-pagination.test.ts`, `tests/integration/google-routes-extended.test.ts`, plus provider-error fixtures for 401/403/429/5xx. || DONE 2026-06-09: added `server/google-provider-client.ts` as the shared Google transport authority with bearer/form request support, per-call timeouts, and typed provider error classification (`http`, `network`, `timeout`, `invalid-json`). Migrated GA4 property/report reads, GSC query/list + URL inspection reads, and Google OAuth code-exchange/refresh flows onto the shared client while preserving the existing exported APIs and route-facing error shapes (`Failed to list GA4 properties: <status>`, `GA4 report failed: <status>`, `GSC API error (...)`, `Token exchange failed: <status>`). Added direct helper coverage in `tests/unit/google-provider-client.test.ts` plus consumer-level parity coverage in `tests/unit/search-console-transport.test.ts` for 401/403/429/5xx degradation behavior; existing `tests/unit/google-auth.test.ts`, `tests/unit/google-analytics-pure.test.ts`, `tests/unit/gsc-pagination.test.ts`, and `tests/integration/google-routes-extended.test.ts` remained green. Verification: `npm run typecheck`, `npx vite build`, `npm run pr-check`, `npx vitest run tests/unit/google-provider-client.test.ts tests/unit/search-console-transport.test.ts tests/unit/google-auth.test.ts tests/unit/google-analytics-pure.test.ts`, `npx vitest run tests/integration/google-routes-extended.test.ts tests/unit/search-console-pure.test.ts tests/unit/gsc-pagination.test.ts`, full `npx vitest run`, `npm run verify:feature-flags`, and `npm run verify:coverage-ratchet`.

items.title: Integration adapters — standardize Webflow result envelopes and pagination helpers
items.source: Parallel simplification explorer audit 2026-06-09 — Integration Adapters
items.notes: Scope: `server/webflow-client.ts`, `server/webflow-pages.ts`, `server/webflow-cms.ts`, `server/webflow-assets.ts`, Webflow SEO write modules, and Webflow tests. Current complexity: Webflow modules repeat `if (!res.ok) return []|null|{ success:false }`, offset/limit pagination, and stringified status/body errors. Behavior-preserving path: extend `webflow-client.ts` with `webflowJson<T>()`, `webflowMutation()`, `paginateWebflow<T>()`, and a typed `WebflowResult<T>`. Preserve existing product function return shapes as adapters over the helper. Split read-only endpoints first; mutate/write flows second because upload/delete/CMS repair behavior is higher risk. Tests/guardrails: `tests/unit/webflow-client.test.ts`, `tests/unit/webflow-pages-pure.test.ts`, `tests/unit/webflow-assets.test.ts`, `tests/integration/webflow-cms-writes.test.ts`, `tests/integration/webflow-seo-writes.test.ts`; assert current degradation behavior is unchanged. || DONE 2026-06-09: added shared Webflow transport helpers in `server/webflow-client.ts` (`webflowJson`, `webflowMutation`, `paginateWebflow`, typed result envelopes) and migrated the duplicated read/write result handling in `server/webflow-pages.ts`, `server/webflow-cms.ts`, `server/webflow-assets.ts`, plus the asset-pagination consumer in `server/routes/webflow-cms-images.ts`. Preserved existing product-facing return shapes and degradation policies (`[]`, `null`, `{ success: false, error }`, custom-code API unavailability detection, token-guarded reads). Kept bespoke raw paths only where the helper abstraction would be wrong for the contract (`getPageDom` text reads, `uploadAsset` S3 handshake, DELETE 204 handling). Added direct helper coverage in `tests/unit/webflow-client.test.ts`, updated the shared Webflow mock harness in `tests/mocks/webflow.ts`, and expanded `tests/unit/webflow-assets-pure.test.ts` to exercise the shared helper-backed call paths. Targeted verification passed: `npm run typecheck`, `npx vite build`, `npm run pr-check`, `npx vitest run tests/unit/webflow-client.test.ts tests/unit/webflow-assets-pure.test.ts tests/integration/webflow-id-semantics.test.ts tests/integration/webflow-cms-writes.test.ts tests/integration/webflow-seo-writes.test.ts tests/integration/webflow-cms-images-routes.test.ts`. Full `npx vitest run` was attempted and exposed unrelated existing suite-health failures outside the Webflow blast radius (port-collision leaks from stale test servers on fixed integration ports and an unrelated `tests/integration/client-auth-full.test.ts` failure), so merge safety should treat full-suite red as pre-existing platform noise rather than this refactor's regression.

items.title: Integration adapters — extract DataForSEO operation runner for cache/credits/telemetry
items.source: Parallel simplification explorer audit 2026-06-09 — Integration Adapters
items.notes: Scope: `server/providers/dataforseo-provider.ts`, `server/seo-data-provider.ts`, keyword provider tests, and KCC provider consumers. Current complexity: methods around related keywords, questions, ideas, site keywords, and backlinks repeat cache read/write, credit logging, task-error handling, `areCreditsExhausted()` branches, and empty-result fallback behavior. Behavior-preserving path: introduce `runDataForSeoOperation<T>()` with endpoint, method, cache key/TTL, normalizer, empty fallback, and credit endpoint label. Keep `apiCall`/`apiGet` as thin wrappers or collapse to a method-aware helper after parity tests. Split into request runner first, then cache/credit runner. Tests/guardrails: `tests/unit/dataforseo-provider.test.ts`, `tests/unit/seo-data-provider.test.ts`, `tests/contract/keyword-provider-abstraction.test.ts`, and keyword command center provider coverage for degraded/empty/credit-exhausted responses. || DONE 2026-06-09: added shared `runDataForSeoOperation<T>()` inside `server/providers/dataforseo-provider.ts` to centralize per-workspace cache read/write, credit exhaustion fallback, provider-call execution, credit telemetry, and common error handling while preserving existing endpoint-specific normalizers and degradation behavior. Migrated the repeated pool of read operations only: related keywords, question keywords, keyword suggestions, keyword ideas, keywords-for-site, Google Ads keywords-for-keywords, domain keywords, URL keywords, domain overview, competitors, backlinks overview, and referring domains. Intentionally left higher-shape paths (`getKeywordMetrics`, local SEO lookup/visibility, and keyword-gap aggregation) on their bespoke logic. Preserved cache keys/TTLs, endpoint labels, payload contracts, empty fallbacks, and subscription-error degradation (`backlinks summary -> null`, `referring domains -> []`), and pinned competitor logging parity so cached competitor reads do not emit fresh-provider discovery logs. Added focused parity coverage in `tests/unit/dataforseo-provider.test.ts` for cached related-keyword hits, backlinks subscription fallback, and cached competitor logging behavior; existing `tests/unit/seo-data-provider.test.ts` and `tests/contract/keyword-provider-abstraction.test.ts` remained green. Verification passed: `npm run typecheck`, `npx vite build`, `npm run pr-check`, `npx vitest run tests/unit/dataforseo-provider.test.ts tests/unit/seo-data-provider.test.ts tests/contract/keyword-provider-abstraction.test.ts`, `npm run verify:feature-flags`, and `npm run verify:coverage-ratchet`. Full `npx vitest run` was attempted and failed outside the DataForSEO blast radius on pre-existing fixed-port integration collisions (`EADDRINUSE` on ports including `13859`, `13341`, `13530`, `13624`, `13400`, `13207`, `13665`, `13648`, `13545`, and `13332`), so full-suite red should be treated as unrelated suite-health noise rather than a regression from this refactor.

items.title: Integration adapters — share AI provider HTTP retry/backoff helper internally
items.source: Parallel simplification explorer audit 2026-06-09 — Integration Adapters
items.notes: Scope: `server/openai-helpers.ts`, `server/anthropic-helpers.ts`, `server/ai.ts`, and AI helper tests. Current complexity: OpenAI and Anthropic helpers duplicate retry-after/backoff/timeout logic; Anthropic tool-use path has a separate retry implementation and less consistent trace/cancellation behavior. Behavior-preserving path: create internal `runAiHttpRequest()` or `withProviderRetry()` used only by provider helpers. Keep `callAI()` as the public boundary and keep provider-specific response normalization separate. Do not expose new direct provider callers. Tests/guardrails: `tests/unit/openai-helpers.test.ts`, `tests/unit/anthropic-helpers.test.ts`, `tests/contract/ai-dispatch-migration.test.ts`, `tests/contract/ai-operation-registry-usage.test.ts`; assert retry timing/error classification parity. || DONE 2026-06-09: added internal `server/ai-provider-retry.ts` with `withProviderRetry()`, `RetryableProviderError`, and shared retry-after delay parsing so provider helpers now share backoff/cancellation mechanics without changing the public `callAI()` boundary or exposing new direct callers. Migrated `server/openai-helpers.ts` and both Anthropic paths in `server/anthropic-helpers.ts` onto the shared helper while preserving provider-specific response parsing, OpenAI dedupe behavior, quota fail-fast handling, token logging, and the existing retry log shapes. Also normalized Anthropic tool-use onto `composeTimeoutSignal()` + `abortableDelay()` and added optional caller `signal` support there for parity with the chat path. Independent adversarial review surfaced one real observability regression: OpenAI caller cancellations were being traced as provider errors after the outer retry extraction. Fixed that parity bug and added direct helper coverage for timeout retries, cancellation during backoff, and final-attempt rethrow behavior in addition to wrapper-level 429 recovery coverage. Verification passed: `npm run typecheck`, `npx vite build`, `npm run pr-check`, `npm run verify:feature-flags`, `npm run verify:coverage-ratchet`, `npx vitest run tests/unit/ai-provider-retry.test.ts server/__tests__/openai-helpers-format.test.ts tests/unit/openai-helpers-pure.test.ts tests/unit/anthropic-helpers-pure.test.ts tests/unit/ai-dispatch.test.ts tests/contract/ai-dispatch-migration.test.ts tests/contract/ai-operation-registry-usage.test.ts`. Full `npx vitest run` was attempted and again failed outside the AI helper blast radius on the same pre-existing fixed-port integration collisions (`EADDRINUSE` including port `13859`), so full-suite red should be treated as unrelated suite-health noise rather than a regression from this refactor.

items.title: Intelligence slices — extract optional enrichment/degradation helper

Keep slice-specific mapping logic local. Tests/guardrails: assembler degradation tests where one dependency throws, seeded workspace output snapshots, and logging assertions that expected optional failures remain warnings while programming errors still surface where required. || DONE 2026-06-09: added `server/intelligence/optional-slice-part.ts` with shared optional-read fallback handling, custom log-message/context support, and opt-in programming-error escalation. Migrated the full roadmap scope across `content-pipeline`, `operational`, `client-signals`, `seo-context`, and `site-health`, preserving each slice’s existing debug/warn degradation boundary rather than flattening them to one logging policy. Added focused helper parity coverage in `tests/unit/optional-slice-part.test.ts` and kept slice-level parity coverage green via `tests/unit/content-pipeline-slice.test.ts`, `tests/unit/operational-slice.test.ts`, `tests/unit/operational-slice-assembly.test.ts`, `tests/unit/client-signals-slice.test.ts`, `tests/unit/client-signals-slice-assembly.test.ts`, `tests/unit/seo-context-slice.test.ts`, `tests/unit/seo-context-slice-assembly.test.ts`, `tests/assemble-content-pipeline.test.ts`, `tests/assemble-operational.test.ts`, `tests/assemble-client-signals.test.ts`, `tests/assemble-site-health.test.ts`, `tests/unit/site-health-slice.test.ts`, `tests/enrich-seo-context.test.ts`, `tests/integration/seo-context-slice-strategy-arrays.test.ts`, and `tests/integration/intelligence-briefing-slice.test.ts`.
