items.title: Product Surface Area Audit
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-18: added machine-readable audit artifact pipeline (`scripts/report-product-surface-audit.ts`, `npm run report:product-surface-audit`) that reads current `FEATURE_AUDIT.md` headline coverage and product-surface taxonomy from `scripts/product-surface-map.ts`, writing canonical output to `data/product-surface-audit.json`. Added human-reviewed prioritization guide `docs/workflows/product-surface-audit-wave6.md` with promote/keep/hide/deprecate buckets and explicit human-verification queue. No route removals in this pass.

items.title: Collaboration Artifact Base
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-18: introduced shared collaboration-artifact contract (`shared/types/collaboration-artifact.ts`) and adapter layer (`src/lib/collaboration-artifacts.ts`) that normalizes `approval_batches` and `client_actions` into one routing primitive with note-based Decisions vs Conversations semantics and shared visibility metadata. `InboxTab` now partitions pending batches/actions through the shared artifact base instead of local duplicated predicates.

items.title: URL/Tab State Helper
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-18: added shared `?tab=` contract helpers in `src/lib/tab-search-param.ts` (`resolveTabSearchParam`, `isValidTabSearchParam`, `clearTabSearchParam`) and migrated Inbox filter resolution, ContentPipeline, LinksPanel, and WorkspaceSettings receiver initialization/cleanup to the shared helper path. Added `tests/unit/tab-search-param.test.ts` and updated inbox shell extraction contract coverage.

items.title: Analytics Date/Metric Contract
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-18: added `shared/types/analytics-contract.ts` with canonical date-range and metric display semantics (including explicit already-percentage boundaries for CTR and bounce/new-user metrics). Applied contract types across analytics API wrappers, client GA4/GSC hooks, GA4 shared hook/query keys, ClientDashboard/ClientHeader date-range state, and GA4 server `CustomDateRange` typing to reduce inline shape drift.

items.title: Background Job Helper Polish
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-18: introduced composable background-job helpers in `src/lib/background-job-helpers.ts` for start+track, attach tracking, cancellation, and completion invalidation. Migrated SEO bulk workflow and content post generation tracking to helper-first usage while preserving TaskPanel/useBackgroundTasks architecture. Added helper unit coverage and updated background-job wiring contract tests.

items.title: Test Factory and Demo Seed Unification
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-18: extracted canonical demo scenario definitions into `shared/demo-workspace-scenarios.ts` and rewired `scripts/seed-demo-workspaces.ts` to consume the shared source of truth. Added fixture helpers in `tests/fixtures/demo-scenario-seed.ts` and parity validation in `tests/unit/demo-scenario-parity.test.ts` so demo seeding and test fixtures align on deterministic workspace identities/integration shape.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Platform Health Wave 5 — Product & Lifecycle Discipline
sprints.rationale: Keep the platform understandable as it grows by managing product surface area, feature flags, deprecations, performance budgets, local onboarding, ADRs, and platform-health cadence.

items.title: Product Surface Rationalization
items.notes: Shipped Wave 5 product-surface governance baseline. Added typed capability map + report script (`scripts/product-surface-map.ts`) with placement/role/lifecycle/recommendation taxonomy, canonical bounded-context coverage checks, and explicit human-verification queue for non-obvious nav/deprecation decisions. Added test coverage in `tests/unit/product-surface-map.test.ts` and rule doc `docs/rules/product-surface-rationalization.md` that codifies manual approval gates. Added `npm run verify:product-surface` command and documented the capability in FEATURE_AUDIT entry 418.

items.title: Feature Flag Lifecycle Management
items.notes: Shipped Wave 5 feature-flag lifecycle management baseline. Expanded `shared/types/feature-flags.ts` into a single source-of-truth catalog with typed lifecycle metadata (owner, createdAt, rolloutTarget, removalCondition, linkedRoadmapItemId, staleAuditCadence, lastReviewedAt), centralized admin grouping/labels, and shared API contract type `FeatureFlagAdminMeta`. Updated server/admin surfaces so `/api/admin/feature-flags` now returns lifecycle context for each flag and FeatureFlagSettings renders that metadata inline. Added lifecycle audit command `npm run verify:feature-flags` (`scripts/feature-flag-lifecycle.ts`) plus test coverage (`tests/unit/feature-flag-lifecycle.test.ts`) and refreshed docs (`docs/rules/feature-flag-lifecycle.md`, development/release-safety references).

items.title: Feature Flag Promotion & Sunset Pass
items.notes: Shipped Wave 5 promotion/sunset pass for low-risk active flags validated on staging. Promoted and removed `client-wins-surface` and `seo-editor-unified` from `shared/types/feature-flags.ts` and lifecycle catalog metadata; removed runtime gates/fallback branches so promoted paths are now canonical (`InsightsBriefingPage` always renders `WinsSurface`; `SeoEditorWrapper` always renders unified editor). Updated contract/component tests and feature audit wording to remove stale flag references.

items.title: Deprecation Lifecycle Discipline
items.notes: Shipped Wave 5 deprecation lifecycle governance baseline. Added typed registry + audit command `npm run verify:deprecations` (`scripts/deprecation-lifecycle.ts`) covering lifecycle states (`deprecated`, `hidden`, `read-only`, `migrated`, `removed`) with state-specific policy checks and required code/test evidence links. Added test coverage (`tests/unit/deprecation-lifecycle.test.ts`) and rule doc `docs/rules/deprecation-lifecycle.md` to codify operating flow and human-verification requirements for deprecated/migrated/removed surfaces.

items.title: Platform Performance Budgets
items.notes: Shipped Wave 5 platform performance budget governance baseline. Added typed performance budget registry + verification command (`npm run verify:performance-budgets`) in `scripts/performance-budgets.ts` covering per-workflow AI call caps, external fetch caps, route response targets, query count budgets, expected background-job durations, cache expectations, and escalation triggers/actions. Seeded high-risk workflows across jobs and public/admin read paths with required code/test evidence references and policy validation checks (duplicate ids, numeric budget integrity, evidence path existence, background-job duration requirements). Added rule doc `docs/rules/performance-budgets.md` and unit coverage in `tests/unit/performance-budgets.test.ts`.

items.title: Local Dev & Agent Onboarding Confidence
items.notes: Shipped Wave 5 local onboarding confidence baseline. Added deterministic local fake-provider mode (`LOCAL_FAKE_PROVIDERS=true`) for SEO providers plus synthetic AI responses in OpenAI/Anthropic helpers so first-hour setup works without external keys. Added one-command demo workspace seeding (`npm run seed:demo`, script: `scripts/seed-demo-workspaces.ts`) and one-command core smoke bundle (`npm run smoke:core`). Documented onboarding workflow + environment tiers in `docs/workflows/local-dev-onboarding.md`, linked from codebase overview, and added unit coverage for local mode + fake provider contracts.

items.title: Recurring Platform Health Sprint Cadence
items.notes: Shipped recurring platform-health cadence contract. Added source-of-truth registry (`data/platform-health-cadence.json`) with 4-6 sprint cadence policy, measurable dimensions, checkpoint evidence links, and Wave 5 baseline metrics. Added verifier command `npm run verify:platform-health-cadence` (`scripts/platform-health-cadence.ts`) with policy/roadmap-link checks, due-window computation, and unit coverage (`tests/unit/platform-health-cadence.test.ts`). Added workflow playbook `docs/workflows/platform-health-cadence.md` and wired cadence audit into `verify-platform`.

items.title: Architecture Decision Record Log
items.notes: Shipped lightweight ADR governance baseline. Added ADR home + six seed architecture decisions in `docs/adr/` covering background jobs, workspace-intelligence slices, feature-flag lifecycle/sunset, client/admin route split, unified AI dispatch, and bounded-context service extraction. Added verifier command `npm run verify:adr-log` (`scripts/adr-log.ts`) with required-section and required-topic coverage checks plus unit tests (`tests/unit/adr-log.test.ts`). Added workflow playbook `docs/workflows/adr-log.md` and wired ADR verification into `verify-platform`.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Platform Health Wave 4 — Runtime & Operational Confidence
sprints.rationale: Improve runtime confidence: know when integrations fail, evaluate AI quality, recover data safely, observe operations, and protect tenant boundaries.

items.title: Integration Health Center
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-15: added a typed workspace-scoped Integration Health Center contract (`shared/types/integration-health.ts`), backend aggregator endpoint (`GET /api/integrations/health/:workspaceId`) in `server/routes/health.ts`, and frontend Connections-tab surface with React Query wiring (`useIntegrationHealth`, `queryKeys.admin.integrationHealth`). Health cards now report configured/missing/degraded state for Webflow, Google auth, GSC, GA4, SEMRush, DataForSEO, Stripe, OpenAI, Anthropic, and SMTP, including quota-status placeholders, token expiry visibility for Google auth, and affected feature mapping. Added integration endpoint coverage (`tests/integration/health-routes.test.ts`) and hook coverage (`tests/component/useIntegrationHealth.test.tsx`).

items.title: AI Reliability & Evaluation Harness
items.notes: Shipped Wave 4 AI reliability closeout: added shared reliability contracts (`shared/types/ai-reliability.ts`), canonical trace/scenario registry (`scripts/ai-reliability-registry.ts`), reliability report (`scripts/report-ai-reliability.ts`, markdown + `--json` + `--soft-gate`), pipeline wiring advisory report (`scripts/report-ai-pipeline-wiring.ts`), trace-map docs (`docs/testing/ai-reliability-pipeline-trace-map.md`), and new contract/unit/integration coverage (`tests/contract/ai-pipeline-trace-map.test.ts`, `tests/unit/ai-reliability-harness.test.ts`, `tests/integration/ai-critical-domain-reliability.test.ts`). Coverage now traces schema, content brief/review, SEO assist, client decision support, diagnostics, admin chat, client search chat, and brand/voice provenance-sensitive paths.

items.title: Data Integrity & Recovery Drills
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-15: added repeatable data integrity and recovery tooling (npm run verify:data-integrity) with SQLite quick/integrity checks, foreign-key violation reporting, workspace-orphan detection across workspace-scoped tables, explicit cross-table consistency checks, and a canonical artifact preserve-vs-rebuild map. Added recovery runbook notes covering backup/restore drills and restore-based migration rollback flow, plus unit coverage for healthy and corrupted database scenarios.

items.title: Observability as Product Infrastructure
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-15: added platform observability telemetry capture for operation traces, slow-route tracking, AI outcomes, external provider outcomes (SEMRush/DataForSEO), and job lifecycle traces. Added typed workspace observability contracts and report builder in shared and server modules, workspace-scoped API endpoint /api/observability/:workspaceId, and a CLI report via npm run verify:observability. The report covers failed jobs, external API failure rates and latency, AI cost and latency by feature, slow-route leaderboards, and critical sync last-success timestamps. Added workflow docs and integration coverage for the endpoint.

items.title: Release Safety Checklist & Smoke Flow
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-15: added a practical release-safety workflow with roadmap-derived deploy notes and a repeatable checklist/report script (`npm run verify:release-safety`) covering feature-class release gates, staging smoke suite, rollback readiness, feature-flag rollout, and a post-release monitoring window. Added companion workflow documentation (`docs/workflows/release-safety.md`) with concrete command paths for health/smoke verification and release execution.

items.title: Recurring Permission & Tenant Boundary Audit
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-15: Added recurring tenant-boundary audit CLI with fail/warn/pass findings across workspace route guards, upload protection, Stripe webhook trust boundary, public serialization hygiene, known foreign-ID regression coverage, and client-user workspace assertion contracts. Added report wrapper, workflow doc, package scripts, and unit tests.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Platform Health Wave 3 — Silent-Failure Reduction Rails
sprints.rationale: Reduce correct-looking but miswired code by centralizing serializers, events, AI operation contracts, external fetch behavior, and workspace mutation lifecycle rails.

items.title: Client-Safe Serializer Layer
items.notes:
Create explicit serializers for high-value admin/client/public views such as toPublicWorkspaceView(), toClientInboxItem(), toClientSchemaView(), and toAdminSchemaView(). Goal: stop route handlers from hand-picking fields inline and reduce regressions where the backend stores a field but public/client endpoints forget to expose it.
Shipped 2026-05-14 in PR #734: added explicit client-safe/public/admin serializers across workspace/public, inbox, and schema read paths with contract coverage so route handlers no longer hand-pick field lists inline.

items.title: Domain Event Definitions
items.notes:
Layer a richer event registry over WS_EVENTS that documents event name, owning domain, producer routes/services, payload shape, query keys to invalidate, admin/client listeners, and related activity type. This should prevent drift where a broadcast exists but no listener handles it, or a listener expects a payload field that one emitter does not send.
Shipped 2026-05-14: added `scripts/platform-domain-event-definitions.ts` as the canonical WS event registry (owning context, producer/listener surfaces, invalidation hints, activity mappings), added advisory report CLI (`scripts/report-domain-event-definitions.ts`, markdown + --json), and unit coverage for full WS_EVENTS key coverage, stable report shape, and orphan producer/listener mapping detection.

items.title: AI Operation Registry
items.notes:
Build a registry for AI operations that declares feature/domain, provider/model, prose vs structured JSON, response schema/parser, research-mode expectations, cost-tracking key, timeout/retry policy, and whether the operation may run synchronously or must use the background job platform. This extends callAI() from a dispatcher into an auditable contract surface.
Shipped 2026-05-14: added server/ai-operation-registry.ts as the canonical contract map, extended callAI() to accept operation ids with registry-derived defaults (provider/model/feature/retry/timeout/responseFormat/researchMode), and wired representative high-value flows (content brief regenerate, schema plan, client search chat, content decay, keyword strategy synthesis, workspace context generation jobs). Added unit + contract coverage for registry integrity, dispatcher default/override behavior, and representative operation wiring.

items.title: Server External Fetch Helper
items.notes:
Create shared helpers for external/public web fetches and provider API fetches. Standardize timeouts, redirect behavior, user-agent/headers, safe URL handling, error classification, expected network TypeError handling, and logging. Migrate high-risk sitemap/page/image/provider fetch call sites first.
Shipped 2026-05-15: expanded `server/external-fetch.ts` with `fetchPublicWeb*`, `fetchProvider*`, and `fetchExternalBytes` helpers; added URL safety modes, DNS/private-address SSRF guards, redirect-chain revalidation, and explicit unsafe/timeout/network/http classification. Migrated high-risk call sites in semrush, dataforseo provider, sales audit, web scraper, rewrite-chat load-page, webflow alt-text image downloads, webflow-pages sitemap reads, and internal-links fetch paths. Added unit coverage for redirect-to-private, DNS-to-private, and IPv6-mapped loopback (`::ffff:7f00:1`) blocking plus integration coverage updates for rewrite-chat load-page safety behavior.

items.title: Workspace Mutation Helper
items.notes:
Introduce a lightweight runWorkspaceMutation-style helper for repeated mutation lifecycle pieces: workspace scoping, optional read-before-write context, transaction boundary, activity logging, broadcast event, error shape, and serialized response. Avoid over-abstracting Express; target high-churn workspace-scoped writes where missing activity/broadcast bugs are expensive.
Shipped 2026-05-15: promoted `runWorkspaceMutation` beyond the content-plan pilot by migrating `server/routes/client-actions.ts` admin/client mutation paths (create, admin update, public respond) to the shared lifecycle helper with route-specific error mapping and explicit read-before-write guards. Added helper-adoption contract coverage (`tests/contract/workspace-mutation-helper-adoption.test.ts`) and refreshed integration helper coverage naming (`tests/integration/workspace-mutation-helper-pilot.test.ts`) to keep the pattern auditable in high-churn workspace-scoped writes.

items.title: SEO Editor Job Safety + Page Edit State Wiring
items.source: Backend Health + Content Quality Hardening PR 6
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-13: retired the synchronous AI `/api/webflow/seo-bulk-fix/:siteId` write route in favor of the existing `bulk-seo-fix` background job, added page-state broadcasts and activity context for background bulk fixes plus SEO suggestion select/dismiss mutations, removed the stale frontend bulk-fix wrapper, and switched SEO Editor reads to the all-pages source while preserving CMS manual-apply/write guards.

items.title: Unified SEO Editor Static + CMS Write Targets
items.notes:
PR #711 landed the shared SEO Editor write-target contract/resolver and CMS approval apply support, but staging smoke found product-quality issues in the unified surface: duplicated Sent to Client panels, unscoped approval history, CMS summaries that may already be truncated at source, and missing effective-title fallback semantics when a CMS item name is the practical SEO title. Follow-up hotfix gated the unified shell behind `seo-editor-unified` (default off) so the legacy Pages / CMS Collections split remains active while these issues are resolved.
Shipped 2026-05-15: resolved unified-surface quality issues by rendering a single SEO-scoped `PendingApprovals` panel in unified mode (while disabling nested duplicates in static/CMS child sections), preserving scoped approval visibility. Added CMS effective-title fallback semantics so blank SEO-title fields fall back to item name in both write-target resolution and preview rendering. Removed extra UI truncation in CMS approval history/value summaries to avoid compounding already-truncated source values. Added/updated contract and unit coverage (`seo-editor-unified-flag-gate`, `seo-write-target-resolver`) for the new unified panel and fallback behavior.

items.title: Route-to-Service Extraction Pilot
items.notes:
Choose one bounded context, preferably Schema or Inbox, and move business logic out of route files into server/domains/<domain>/ while preserving all existing URLs, response shapes, broadcasts, activity logs, and tests. Treat this as a proof of the organization pattern before expanding it.
Shipped 2026-05-15: completed an Inbox route-to-service extraction pilot by introducing `server/domains/inbox/client-actions-mutations.ts` and delegating admin create/update + public respond mutation orchestration from `server/routes/client-actions.ts` into the domain module while preserving route URLs, response shapes, activity logging, broadcasts, and side effects (email + playbook enqueue). Also promoted `runWorkspaceMutation` helper ownership to `server/workspace-mutation-helper.ts` (with route shim compatibility) and refreshed the mutation-helper adoption contract to enforce helper usage on the extracted inbox domain module. Added extraction contract coverage (`tests/contract/inbox-route-service-extraction.test.ts`) plus targeted route/integration verification for behavior parity.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Platform Health Wave 2b — Critical Test Coverage Hardening
sprints.rationale: Raise confidence in the highest-risk product domains before chasing global 80-90% coverage. Current baseline from 2026-05-13 coverage run: 32.31% lines, 30.66% statements, 24.64% branches, 24.30% functions. The first goal is critical-domain behavior coverage, not vanity global line coverage.

items.title: Critical Domain Coverage Baseline + Ownership Matrix
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-13: added `docs/testing/critical-domain-coverage-baseline.md`, `scripts/report-critical-domain-coverage.ts`, `tests/unit/critical-domain-coverage-report.test.ts`, and `npm run verify:coverage-baseline`. The advisory report covers every canonical bounded context with critical surfaces, existing test signals, known gaps, target coverage posture, and recommended next test slices while preserving the current 2026-05-13 global baseline.

items.title: P0 Auth, Billing, Workspace, and Public Route Contract Tests
items.notes: Focused slice shipped 2026-05-13: added route-contract coverage for workspace-scoped admin reads, HMAC/no-JWT admin pass-through, cross-workspace client-user mutation guards, public workspace client-safe serialization, trial/effective tier fields, protected public billing routes, payment-status scoping, and admin payment workspace isolation. Closeout shipped 2026-05-14: completed remaining P0 auth/billing seams with route-level webhook ingress contracts (`/api/stripe/webhook` missing signature, verification failure, and success path), and validated the broader contract matrix across `wave2b-route-contracts`, `public-portal-auth`, `stripe-admin-auth`, `stripe-checkout-flow`, `stripe-webhooks`, `stripe-webhook-idempotency`, `journey-payment-tier-upgrade`, and `tier-gate-enforcement`.

items.title: P0 Mutation Safety Suite
items.notes: Focused slice shipped 2026-05-13: added mutation lifecycle coverage for work-order status updates/completion and admin approval create/delete paths, including DB writes, workspace scoping, activity logging, WS_EVENTS-based broadcasts, page-state side effects, public/admin read paths, and source-level invalidation contracts for approval/work-order events. Schema mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-13: added coverage for schema plan send-to-client, client schema feedback, publish/retract/delete/rollback, snapshot/page-state/activity/history/broadcast side effects, and no-side-effect failure/cross-workspace cases; fixed schema-plan feedback to broadcast the schema-plan event so client schema caches refresh. Content request/review mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-13: added coverage for public create/submit, admin patch/delete, client approve/request-changes/decline/upgrade/comment, post-review decisions, inbox/page-state side effects, broadcasts, activity, and no-side-effect invalid/cross-workspace cases. Client action/background-job mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-13: added coverage for admin/public client-action lifecycle contracts, actor attribution, no-side-effect invalid/cross-workspace cases, content_decay action-playbook success/failure writes, content brief read paths, job state, activity, broadcasts, and invalidation contracts. Billing mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added Stripe/content-subscription lifecycle coverage and billing broadcast contracts; fixed content subscription webhooks so they no longer overwrite workspace platform plan subscription state, emit workspace tier updates with null tier payloads, or skip known content subscriptions when Stripe metadata is missing, moved content-subscription broadcasts onto WS_EVENTS constants, wired admin/client invalidation for subscription lifecycle events, and added activity/status handling for content subscription status changes. SEO background-job mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added route-level lifecycle coverage for bulk analyze, bulk rewrite, and bulk accept-fixes jobs across job creation/completion, page_keywords/seo_suggestions/page_edit_states writes, activity logging, WS_EVENTS broadcasts, admin read-path visibility, and no-side-effect invalid/cross-workspace starts; no runtime fixes were required. Content post generation mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added route-level lifecycle coverage for `/api/content-posts/:workspaceId/generate`, including skeleton creation, background job completion/failure state, content_posts persistence, activity logging, CONTENT_UPDATED/POST_UPDATED broadcasts, admin read-path visibility, and no-side-effect missing-brief or duplicate-start cases; no runtime fixes were required. Keyword strategy background-job mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added route-level lifecycle coverage for `POST /api/jobs` with `keyword-strategy`, including persisted `keywordStrategy`/page_keywords/content_gaps/quick_wins writes, activity logging, STRATEGY_UPDATED broadcasts, tracked-keyword seeding, usage reservation/refund behavior, no-op incremental completions, duplicate-start rejection, and no-side-effect failure handling; no runtime fixes were required. Page-analysis background-job mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added route-level lifecycle coverage for `POST /api/jobs` with `page-analysis`, including page_keywords persistence, activity logging, STRATEGY_UPDATED broadcasts, graceful skipped-page completion on per-page AI failure, duplicate-start rejection, and no-side-effect cross-workspace starts; fixed the route to reject mismatched `workspaceId`/`siteId` pairs before a job can start writing into another workspace. Billing edge-case follow-up slice shipped 2026-05-14: expanded content-subscription lifecycle coverage for paused/incomplete status mapping plus malformed `customer.subscription.updated` and `customer.subscription.deleted` events with no metadata/local row, asserting strict no-op behavior (no workspace mutation, no activity writes, no broadcasts) when ownership context is absent. Schema-generator background-job mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added route-level lifecycle coverage for `POST /api/jobs` with `schema-generator`, including snapshot persistence, `schema_generated` activity logging, `WS_EVENTS.SCHEMA_SNAPSHOT_UPDATED` broadcasts, admin/public schema snapshot read-path visibility, duplicate-start rejection, and strict no-side-effect cross-workspace or failure behavior. Workspace-context background-job mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added lifecycle coverage for legacy and canonical starts (`/api/workspaces/:id/generate-brand-voice` and `POST /api/jobs`) across brand-voice, knowledge-base, and persona jobs, including deterministic done/error job state, stable result payload shape for admin reads, one-time `voice_calibrated` action recording plus `OUTCOME_ACTION_RECORDED` broadcast for brand-voice, no duplicate action/broadcast on repeat runs, and no-side-effect duplicate/failure behavior. Deep-diagnostic background-job mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added deterministic lifecycle coverage for `POST /api/jobs` with `deep-diagnostic`, including completed/failed report states, job terminal state, insight report-stamp persistence, diagnostic activity logging, DIAGNOSTIC_COMPLETE/DIAGNOSTIC_FAILED broadcasts, read-path visibility, duplicate-start rejection, and cross-workspace no-side-effect contracts. Legacy jobs mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added deterministic lifecycle coverage for `seo-audit`, `bulk-seo-fix`, and `sales-report` jobs, including done/error job state, workspace/site isolation, activity/broadcast side effects on success, and strict no-side-effect behavior for invalid, duplicate, and cross-workspace starts. Media jobs mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added deterministic lifecycle coverage for `compress`, `bulk-compress`, and `bulk-alt` jobs, including done/error state handling, duplicate-start/cross-workspace guards, summary activity behavior, and strict no-side-effect behavior on failed fetch/generation paths. Contract matrix slice shipped 2026-05-14: added background-job coverage contracts and high-risk mutation route matrix guardrails to keep lifecycle coverage anchored as new job types and route families are added. Webflow CMS mutation-safety slice shipped 2026-05-14: added route-level lifecycle coverage for `PATCH /api/webflow/collections/:collectionId/items/:itemId` and `POST /api/webflow/collections/:collectionId/publish`, asserting success-path page-state writes/activity/broadcast/read visibility and strict no-side-effect behavior for provider failures and cross-workspace site mismatches. SEO provider-failure closeout slice shipped 2026-05-14: added all-failed safeguards for SEO bulk background jobs (`seo-bulk-analyze`, `seo-bulk-rewrite`, `seo-bulk-accept-fixes`) so provider-wide failures now end in terminal `error` (not phantom `done`) and added lifecycle assertions for no mutation/activity/success-broadcast side effects when every item fails. Copy batch mutation-safety closeout shipped 2026-05-14: added lifecycle coverage for `POST /api/copy/:workspaceId/:blueprintId/batch`, including deterministic success/all-failed terminal states, activity and WS_EVENTS batch broadcast assertions, read-path visibility via `GET /api/copy/:workspaceId/batch/:batchId`, and strict no-side-effect malformed/cross-workspace guards; fixed the route to reject missing or cross-workspace blueprints before any batch job/activity/broadcast side effects.

items.title: External Failure + State Machine Coverage
items.notes: Mock Webflow, Stripe, Google, DataForSEO, SEMrush, OpenAI, and Anthropic failure modes and assert failed/error states rather than phantom success. Expand transition-guard tests for approval items, content requests, client actions, work orders, content subscriptions, posts, and background jobs so illegal transitions fail consistently. Focused transition-guard slice shipped 2026-05-14: expanded unit coverage to include full valid/invalid transition matrices for `CLIENT_ACTION_TRANSITIONS` and `BRIEFING_DRAFT_TRANSITIONS`, closing state-machine coverage gaps in those two entities while this roadmap item remains pending for broader external-provider failure breadth. External-failure contract slice shipped 2026-05-14: added provider-matrix guardrails plus exhaustive state-machine graph contracts to keep failure and transition coverage from silently regressing as routes/providers evolve. Webflow CMS external-failure + state-machine slice shipped 2026-05-14: added route-level failure contracts that assert no phantom page-state/activity/broadcast success on upstream Webflow write failures and added background-job transition maps plus runtime guard coverage so terminal jobs cannot silently reopen. SEO provider-failure hardening slice shipped 2026-05-14: added explicit mutation-safety coverage for OpenAI-powered bulk analyze/rewrite failures and Webflow update failures in bulk accept-fixes, plus DataForSEO/SEMrush-path keyword-strategy provider fetch failure assertions, and expanded provider matrix contracts to keep these failure signals anchored. Closeout slice shipped 2026-05-14: added deterministic brand-identity AI write-failure contracts (no deliverable/version/activity/usage side effects on provider failure), enforced runtime `CONTENT_SUB_TRANSITIONS` in `updateContentSubscription`, expanded subscription transitions for Stripe `incomplete` recovery (`active|paused|past_due -> pending`), and added a state-machine guard coverage contract to keep validateTransition wiring anchored across all critical status entities.

items.title: Client Workflow Component Tests + E2E Smoke Journeys
items.notes: Add focused component/workflow tests for Client Portal and Inbox decisions/conversations/reviews, schema review, content request/review, tier gates, empty/error/loading states, and tab deep-link behavior. Add a small E2E smoke pack for admin send-to-client -> client decision -> admin update, billing/tier gate visibility, background job progress/result, and schema/content publish flows. Keep this to high-value journeys rather than exhaustive UI snapshots. Focused smoke slice shipped 2026-05-14: added a Playwright client workflow smoke pack that validates admin->client->admin decision convergence, public tier/billing visibility coherence, deep-link URL stability (`/client/:workspaceId/inbox?tab=decisions`), and async background-job status surfaces. sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Hardening Pass
sprints.rationale: Data normalization, validation coverage, test gaps, and small code-quality fixes that reduce future bug surface.

items.title: Content Post — Statistics Provenance Check
items.notes: Two-part improvement to reduce hallucinated statistics in generated content. (1) Brief-grounding constraint: during brief generation, extract and tag specific statistics found in scraped SERP/competitor/knowledge-base sources as verifiedStats[]. Inject a generation-time instruction to only cite numbers present in the brief research; use directional language ('significantly faster') when no sourced number exists. (2) Post-generation provenance flag: after unification pass, regex-match all numeric claims in the output and cross-reference against the brief research text. Any number not traceable to a source gets flagged in the PostEditor review checklist for human verification before publish. No automated fact-checking; the goal is surfacing the risk to the reviewer, not replacing judgment.

Added dedicated unit coverage in `tests/unit/workspace-event-bus.test.ts` for connection sharing, auth success/failure flows, unsubscribe teardown, send forwarding, and reconnect lifecycle. Full gates green: typecheck, vite build, vitest, pr-check.

extractPageSections() only tokenizes and

tags. Pages using

items.title: Background generation Phase 2 - migrate drifted long-running generation flows
items.notes: Completed across staged Phase 2 slices by 2026-05-05. KeywordStrategyPanel starts the existing keyword-strategy job through useBackgroundTasks instead of direct SSE; content post generation is job-backed with step progress and cancellation; schema/page-analysis cancellation stays durable after abort-controller cleanup; SEO bulk workers unregister abort controllers; shared schema generation context prep is extracted; schema/page-analysis worker bodies are extracted from server/routes/jobs.ts into dedicated worker modules while the route remains the dispatcher; PageIntelligence rediscovers active page-analysis jobs after navigation/reload so inline progress derives from the same TaskPanel job state; schema snapshot generation, publish, rollback, retract, and delete paths now broadcast schema:snapshot_updated and invalidate admin/client React Query caches; BrandHub knowledge base, brand voice, and persona generation now run through shared background jobs with sessionStorage recovery for completed drafts after navigation.

items.title: Page analysis worker hardening - clarify empty states and fetch failure handling
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/page-analysis-worker-hardening. Page-analysis jobs now finish with a clear no-pages-discovered message, set a user-facing terminal message when OPENAI_API_KEY is missing, and skip AI calls with warning/accounting when all page HTML fetch attempts fail instead of analyzing empty content.

items.title: Billing architecture - consolidate on Stripe Checkout
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-04 in codex/billing-checkout-only. Removed the legacy /api/stripe/create-payment-intent endpoint, deleted the Stripe Elements payment form, simplified client purchases to always create Stripe Checkout sessions, and updated Stripe tests/mocks so Checkout remains the only client purchase architecture. Webhook PaymentIntent handling remains only for Stripe Checkout reconciliation and failure events; the payment_intent.succeeded handler now also finds Checkout-reconciled records by stripePaymentIntentId to avoid false missing-payment errors after hosted Checkout completion.

items.title: Client portal data - finish React Query migration and retire useClientData facade
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/client-data-react-query-slice. Retired src/hooks/useClientData.ts, moved its exported client data helper types into src/components/client/types.ts, and made ClientDashboard compose useClientSearch, useClientGA4, and the focused hooks from src/hooks/client/useClientQueries.ts directly. Preserved query-cache setters for approvals/content requests, workspace-event invalidation keys, date-range query behavior, and pricing hydration through useClientPricing.

items.title: Deep-link contract sweep - fix senders whose ?tab= targets ignore search params
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/tab-deeplink-contracts. StrategyTab now reads useSearchParams/searchParams.get('tab') and maps client briefing ?tab=content-gaps deep links to the Create Content accordion section. Extended tests/contract/tab-deep-link-wiring.test.ts to cover clientPath senders as well as adminPath senders, including client StrategyTab and InboxTab receivers.

items.title: Keyword strategy generation - start through shared background jobs
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-04 in codex/platform-keyword-strategy-background-job. Superseded the admin direct-SSE caller by starting BACKGROUND_JOB_TYPES.KEYWORD_STRATEGY through useBackgroundTasks, deriving the generating state from the active job, preserving SSE progress inside the worker, and fixing internal job route bridges to use signed admin tokens. The legacy SSE endpoint and streamKeywordStrategy helper remain for compatibility until the backend service extraction follow-up removes the internal route-fetch bridge.

items.title: Content post generation - migrate brief-to-post flow to background jobs
items.source: Phase 2 background generation follow-up surfaced during codex/platform-keyword-strategy-background-job
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/content-post-background-jobs. Moved POST /api/content-posts/:workspaceId/generate off legacy post-response generation and onto the shared jobs store with BACKGROUND_JOB_TYPES.CONTENT_POST_GENERATION metadata so TaskPanel can surface it. Preserved the immediate skeleton-post UX, returns jobId with the skeleton, added /api/jobs support for the same job type, kept generation non-cancellable until generatePost is abort-aware, and added route coverage for skeleton response plus persisted job lookup.

items.title: Content post generation - add step progress and cancellation
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/content-post-generation-progress. generatePost now reports durable job progress for context prep, introduction, each body section, conclusion, unification, SEO metadata, and finalization. Content post generation registers an AbortController, passes AbortSignal through content AI helper calls, marks cancelled drafts terminal in the content domain, and BACKGROUND_JOB_TYPES.CONTENT_POST_GENERATION is now cancellable in shared metadata.

items.title: Keyword strategy jobs - extract native service worker with progress callbacks
items.source: Phase 2 background generation follow-up surfaced during codex/platform-keyword-strategy-background-job
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/keyword-strategy-job-service. Extracted keyword strategy generation into server/keyword-strategy-generation.ts so the direct SSE route and BACKGROUND_JOB_TYPES.KEYWORD_STRATEGY worker share native orchestration instead of the job worker internally fetching the route. Preserved active generation guards, billing reservation/refund behavior, persistence, broadcasts, history writes, rank seeding, recommendations, llms.txt regeneration, SSE progress, and job progress translation.

items.title: Background jobs - recover stale pending/running jobs after process restart
items.source: Follow-up surfaced during codex/keyword-strategy-job-service scaled review
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/background-job-stale-recovery. Startup recovery now has an explicit exported recovery path with regression coverage, marks persisted pending/running jobs as error after restart, updates the visible TaskPanel message as well as the error field, and keeps graceful-shutdown interruption messages aligned.

items.title: Generation activity parity - log direct and background generation consistently
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/generation-activity-parity. Keyword strategy success activity now logs from server/keyword-strategy-generation.ts after persistence, so direct SSE/API generation and BACKGROUND_JOB_TYPES.KEYWORD_STRATEGY share the same activity behavior. Removed the job-wrapper strategy_generated log to prevent duplicate entries.

items.title: Webflow SEO suggestions - add list endpoint integration coverage
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/webflow-seo-route-coverage. Added route-level integration coverage for GET /api/webflow/seo-suggestions/:workspaceId, including counts and field filtering, after the low-risk Webflow SEO route split.

items.title: Webflow SEO copy - add happy-path integration coverage
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/webflow-seo-route-coverage. Added a mocked happy-path integration test for POST /api/webflow/seo-copy so the extracted page-tools route has explicit regression coverage.

items.title: AI dispatch - migrate general server generation paths to callAI
items.notes: Verified still valid on origin/staging eb0a5832. Completed across thirteen slices. Earlier slices migrated chat memory summaries, meeting briefs, monthly digests, content decay recommendations, internal link suggestions, SEO audit metadata recommendations, rewrite chat, Webflow keyword analysis, brandscript import, copy-intelligence pattern extraction, copy refresh suggestions, discovery extraction, copy voice feedback classification/suggestion generation, llms.txt page summaries, Webflow per-page SEO copy generation, page analysis jobs, bulk Webflow page analysis jobs, Google Search Console chat, workspace intelligence-profile autofill, anomaly digest summaries, keyword recommendation relevance ranking, and content post creative generation/SEO metadata/voice scoring. Final broad batch migrates the remaining general app generation paths: content briefs and outline regeneration, AEO page review, schema plan/template suggestions, keyword strategy synthesis, content publish field mapping, content post AI review, diagnostic synthesis, admin/client Search chat, jobs bulk SEO fixes, copy pipeline generation/regeneration, and blueprint generation. Claude review follow-up added JSON responseFormat defense to object-shaped parsers in the final batch plus meeting brief generation. Direct provider-helper usage now remains at the dispatcher/helper boundary, provider helper tests/usage exports, parseAIJson compatibility imports, and documented vision payload exceptions.

items.title: SEO provider boundary - finish Semrush/DataForSEO abstraction cleanup
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-05 in codex/seo-provider-keyword-strategy-consolidation. Keyword strategy generation now imports trend/SERP helpers from provider-neutral server/seo-provider-signals.ts instead of server/semrush.ts, while semrush.ts keeps compatibility re-exports for older tests/imports. Keyword strategy route/job/component paths use seoDataMode, keep legacy semrushMode fallback for existing callers and stored strategies, and return a provider-neutral seoDataMode alias from the admin strategy read path. useKeywordStrategy now derives availability from /api/seo-providers/status so DataForSEO-only workspaces enable SEO data mode. Keyword Strategy UI state/props/guide copy now use provider-neutral naming, and generation progress uses seo-data while jobs still label old semrush progress for compatibility.

items.title: Keyword strategy backend - split route monolith and sequence storage normalization
items.notes: Completed across six staged slices. First backend split slice completed 2026-05-05 in codex/keyword-strategy-generation-service-split: pure helper logic moved to server/keyword-strategy-helpers.ts and SEO provider collection moved to server/keyword-strategy-seo-data.ts while preserving the route wrapper, public re-exports, job/direct generation behavior, competitor cache writes, and provider data outputs. Second split slice completed 2026-05-05 in codex/keyword-strategy-generation-service-split-2: live-page discovery/content fetching moved to server/keyword-strategy-pages.ts and GSC/GA4 signal collection moved to server/keyword-strategy-search-data.ts while preserving progress labels, incremental fresh-page recovery, sitemap fallback behavior, and direct/background job compatibility. Third split slice completed 2026-05-06 in codex/keyword-strategy-ai-synthesis-split: AI prompt context assembly, page-batch mapping, keyword-pool construction, incremental preserve/merge handling, post-AI keyword validation, and master site-level synthesis moved to server/keyword-strategy-ai-synthesis.ts while preserving direct/background job compatibility, progress labels, declined/requested keyword guardrails, competitor brand filtering, invalid-master-JSON payloads, and incremental no-op refunds. Fourth split slice completed 2026-05-06 in codex/keyword-strategy-enrichment-split: post-synthesis enrichment moved into server/keyword-strategy-enrichment.ts, covering GSC/provider metric hydration, SERP targeting, content-gap scoring/sorting, cannibalization, topical authority clusters, site keyword metrics, quick-win ROI scoring, and final impact sorting while preserving direct/background job compatibility and existing progress labels. Fifth split slice completed 2026-05-06 in codex/keyword-strategy-persistence-split: page-keyword table persistence, strategy-history snapshots/pruning, workspace strategy blob writes, strategy_generated activity, STRATEGY_UPDATED broadcasts, cache/intelligence invalidation, and strategy outcome-action recording moved into server/keyword-strategy-persistence.ts while preserving full/incremental write semantics and direct/background job compatibility. Sixth split slice completed 2026-05-06 in codex/keyword-strategy-followons-split: tracked-keyword auto-seeding, keyword-strategy-triggered llms.txt regeneration, and deduped recommendation refreshes moved into server/keyword-strategy-follow-ons.ts while preserving response/follow-on ordering and shared direct-route/background-job orchestration. Storage normalization remains sequenced under existing items #365, #367, #368, #369, and #370.

items.title: Webflow SEO backend - split audit, rewrite, bulk jobs, and apply flows
items.notes: Completed in staged slices on 2026-05-04 and 2026-05-05. SEO suggestion routes moved to server/routes/webflow-seo-suggestions.ts, page HTML/SEO copy routes moved to server/routes/webflow-seo-page-tools.ts, single-page /api/webflow/seo-rewrite moved to server/routes/webflow-seo-rewrite.ts with shared limit handling, live /api/webflow/seo-bulk-fix and /api/webflow/seo-pattern-apply moved to server/routes/webflow-seo-apply.ts, legacy /api/webflow/seo-bulk-rewrite suggestion generation moved to server/routes/webflow-seo-bulk-rewrite.ts, /api/webflow/seo-audit moved to server/routes/webflow-seo-audit.ts, and /api/seo/:workspaceId background job start endpoints moved to server/routes/webflow-seo-jobs.ts. Bulk worker bodies live in server/webflow-seo-bulk-accept-fixes-job.ts, server/webflow-seo-bulk-rewrite-job.ts, and server/webflow-seo-bulk-analyze-job.ts. On-demand audit page-state marking and audit insight bridge handling live in server/webflow-seo-audit-bridges.ts. The old server/routes/webflow-seo.ts dispatcher has been retired without changing endpoint behavior.

items.title: Monolith split Phase 1 - extract low-risk Webflow SEO and pageElements boundaries
items.notes: Completed on 2026-05-04. Extracted SEO suggestion CRUD/apply routes and Webflow page tools from server/routes/webflow-seo.ts, registered the focused routers in server/route-groups/webflow.ts, and moved the read-only pageElements assembler/formatter to server/intelligence/page-elements-slice.ts with unit coverage. This preserves behavior while creating safe ownership boundaries for the larger monolith split sprint.

items.title: Client StrategyTab - split workflow state into hooks and sections
items.notes: Completed across seven staged slices on 2026-05-06. First slice extracted keyword feedback, tracked strategy keyword, and business-priority workflow state/API calls from StrategyTab into focused hooks. Second slice extracted the keyword detail drawer and shared keyword display helpers into client/strategy modules with static contract guards. Third slice extracted the Create Content/content-opportunity accordion into StrategyContentOpportunitiesSection with a static contract guard. Fourth slice extracted the Improve Pages quick-win/page-review accordion into StrategyPageImprovementsSection with a static contract guard. Fifth slice extracted the Guide This Strategy business-priority accordion into StrategyBusinessPrioritiesSection with a static contract guard, corrected the business-priorities deep-link scroll target, and aligned keyboard adds with the existing 10-priority cap. Sixth slice extracted the Strategy Keywords request/feedback surface, declined-keyword restore accordion, and decline-reason modal into focused strategy components with a static contract guard. Seventh slice completed the shell reduction from origin/staging 210f8cb by extracting the Strategy Snapshot, Recommended Next Steps, and Page Keyword Map accordion into focused strategy components while preserving tier gates, deep-link expansion, scroll callbacks, and feedback wiring.

items.title: Feature tool monoliths - split SchemaSuggester, PageIntelligence, SeoEditor, VoiceTab
items.notes: Verified still valid on origin/staging eb0a5832. SchemaSuggester, PageIntelligence, SeoEditor, and VoiceTab remain >1,000-line feature modules. PageIntelligence slices on 2026-05-06 have extracted pure display/scoring helpers, data derivation helpers for persisted-analysis hydration/search/sort/fix-queue ranking, the pages-tab header/control strip, the pages list/expanded detail renderer, page row/detail renderers, expanded detail strategy/analysis/persisted-summary/action sections, and parent workflow hooks for page-analysis jobs, keyword editing/tracking, and SEO copy state with unit/source contract coverage; see FEATURE_AUDIT entries 344-350. SchemaSuggester generation workflow extraction now moves saved snapshot/page-type/page-picker/fix-context scan state and the shared schema-generator background job handling into useSchemaSuggesterGeneration, with source contract coverage and typed BACKGROUND_JOB_TYPES.SCHEMA_GENERATOR startup; see FEATURE_AUDIT entry 351. SchemaSuggester CMS workflow extraction now moves CMS template page loading/generation/publish/copy state, schema CMS field-mapping query/mutation cache updates, and detected location/service mapping collection derivation into useSchemaSuggesterCmsWorkflow with source contract coverage; see FEATURE_AUDIT entry 352. SchemaSuggester publishing workflow extraction now moves page publish/retract, client approval submission, manual-delivery, schema edit/copy, template-save, bulk publish, and edit-state refresh state into useSchemaSuggesterPublishingWorkflow with source contract coverage; see FEATURE_AUDIT entry 353. SchemaSuggester results rendering extraction now moves schema impact display/fetch state plus page/validation/edit-status summary rendering into SchemaImpactPanel, SchemaResultsSummary, and SchemaEditStatusSummary with unit/source contract coverage; see FEATURE_AUDIT entry 354. SchemaPageCard details extraction now moves existing-schema badges, validation finding grouping, recommendation banners, graph summaries, generation diagnostics, and rich-result eligibility into SchemaPageCardDetails with component coverage; see FEATURE_AUDIT entry 355. SchemaSuggester setup extraction now moves business-profile callout, generator hero actions, initial page type picker/guide, and CMS field mapping rendering into SchemaGeneratorSetup with component coverage; see FEATURE_AUDIT entry 356. Schema monolith cleanup is complete; stop here before SeoEditor and VoiceTab per sprint direction. SeoEditor decomposition resumed on 2026-05-07 with Phase 1 contract/type extraction (PR #602), Phase 2 derived-helper extraction for approval payload assembly plus page filtering/ranking logic (PR #603), Phase 3 bulk-helper extraction for pattern preview/apply payloads, bulk rewrite job request payloads, and static-page SEO/openGraph update payload assembly (PR #605), Phase 4 persistence-helper extraction for session cache/draft/job-id hydration and guardrail coverage (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 365), Phase 5 approval-workflow hook extraction (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 366) with filtered select-all mismatch hardening, Phase 6 page-workflow hook extraction for save/draft/rewrite/analyze orchestration (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 367), Phase 7 bulk-workflow hook extraction for analyze-all/bulk-fix/pattern/rewrite orchestration with page-state clear tracking consolidation and source contract coverage (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 368), Phase 8 shell-controls extraction for tracking summary/analyze controls/CMS toggle/search composition hardening (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 369), Phase 9 header-action extraction for stats/refresh/fix/publish/action-banner composition hardening (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 370), Phase 10 page-list extraction for CMS empty-state/banner and PageEditRow composition hardening (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 371), Phase 11 workflow-panels extraction for pending approvals/unsaved banner/SEO suggestions/bulk-operations composition hardening (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 372), and Phase 12 session-state hook extraction for cache hydration/persistence, fix-context auto-expand, and local expanded/preview state composition hardening (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 373). VoiceTab decomposition resumed on 2026-05-07 with Phase 1 model/helper extraction that moved shared constants/defaults/mappings plus normalized dedupe helpers into `src/components/brand/voice-tab/voiceTabModel.ts`, added source-contract guardrails, and covered duplicate/whitespace edge cases in unit tests (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 374). VoiceTab Phase 2 now extracts the samples and DNA sections into `src/components/brand/voice-tab/SamplesSection.tsx` and `src/components/brand/voice-tab/DNASection.tsx`, preserving mutation/toast behavior while adding source-contract coverage to keep section ownership out of the root shell (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 375). VoiceTab Phase 3 now extracts guardrails and calibration surfaces into `src/components/brand/voice-tab/GuardrailsSection.tsx`, `src/components/brand/voice-tab/CalibrationSection.tsx`, and `src/components/brand/voice-tab/useVoiceCalibrationWorkflow.ts`, with source-contract coverage and preserved generate/refine/feedback/sample flows (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 376). VoiceTab Phase 4 now extracts profile query/mutation/tab-section orchestration into `src/components/brand/voice-tab/useVoiceTabShell.ts` with source-contract coverage that locks root-shell composition boundaries (FEATURE_AUDIT entry 377). With VoiceTab shell cleanup merged, this feature-tool monolith split item is now complete. Final closeout on 2026-05-08 also completed CmsEditor phases 1-7 and PageRewriteChat phases 1-7 (PRs #627 through #636), so this umbrella platform-consolidation split item is now fully done.

items.title: CmsEditor monolith decomposition - phase 1 contracts + shared model extraction
items.source: Loop follow-up after VoiceTab decomposition completion
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-08 on `codex/cms-editor-decomp-phase1`. Extracted CmsEditor contracts and pure helpers into `src/components/cms-editor/cmsEditorModel.ts` (initial edit map assembly, SEO field selection, search/rank helpers, approval payload assembly, approval-history map builder), and rewired `src/components/CmsEditor.tsx` to consume the module while preserving behavior. Bug sniffing fix included: approval history is now sorted by `updatedAt` descending before render so the inline "Latest" badge always reflects the most recent approval event. Added unit coverage (`tests/unit/cms-editor-model.test.ts`) and source-contract guardrails (`tests/contract/cms-editor-phase1-model-extraction.test.ts`) to prevent model/contracts drift back into the root shell.

items.title: CmsEditor monolith decomposition - phase 2 approval workflow hook extraction
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-08 on `codex/cms-editor-decomp-phase2`. Extracted approval workflow state/orchestration from `src/components/CmsEditor.tsx` into `src/components/cms-editor/useCmsEditorApprovalWorkflow.ts`, including selection toggles, select-all behavior, payload assembly, send-for-approval mutation, transient success state, and approval refresh key wiring. `CmsEditor.tsx` now consumes the hook and keeps shell composition only for this workflow path. Bug sniffing hardening included: select-all now guards empty collections from false "all selected" toggles, and validation/network approval errors remain surfaced through the existing `ErrorState` UI path after extraction. Added source-contract guardrails (`tests/contract/cms-editor-phase2-approval-hook-extraction.test.ts`) and updated phase-1 contract assertions to match the new ownership boundary.

items.title: CmsEditor monolith decomposition - phase 3 AI rewrite workflow hook extraction
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-08 on `codex/cms-editor-decomp-phase3`. Extracted AI rewrite/variation workflow state and orchestration from `src/components/CmsEditor.tsx` into `src/components/cms-editor/useCmsEditorAiWorkflow.ts`, including AI loading state, rewrite request assembly, paired rewrite handling, variation application helpers, and session-storage-backed variation persistence. `CmsEditor.tsx` now consumes the hook and keeps composition-only wiring for AI controls. Bug sniffing hardening included: AI failures and empty/no-suggestion responses now surface user-visible `ErrorState` feedback (`aiError`) instead of silently failing. Added source-contract guardrails (`tests/contract/cms-editor-phase3-ai-workflow-hook-extraction.test.ts`) to lock the new ownership boundary.

items.title: CmsEditor monolith decomposition - phase 4 publish + bulk workflow hook extraction
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-08 on `codex/cms-editor-decomp-phase4`. Extracted publish and bulk rewrite orchestration from `src/components/CmsEditor.tsx` into `src/components/cms-editor/useCmsEditorPublishBulkWorkflow.ts`, including publish pending/success state, bulk mode/progress/result state, collection/item auto-expansion during bulk operations, and concurrency-limited bulk rewrite dispatch. `CmsEditor.tsx` now consumes the hook and keeps composition-only wiring for publish/bulk controls. Bug sniffing hardening included: bulk rewrite failure accounting now correctly tracks AI generation failures (not only thrown promise rejections) by having AI rewrite actions return explicit success booleans consumed by the bulk workflow. Added source-contract guardrails (`tests/contract/cms-editor-phase4-publish-bulk-hook-extraction.test.ts`) to lock the ownership boundary.

items.title: CmsEditor monolith decomposition - phase 5 shell state + session hook extraction
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-08 on `codex/cms-editor-decomp-phase5`. Extracted root shell/session state ownership from `src/components/CmsEditor.tsx` into `src/components/cms-editor/useCmsEditorShellState.ts`, including cache hydration/persistence for edits and expansion state, shell-local state for saving/saved/history/search/errors/preview, and shared toggles/update helpers. `CmsEditor.tsx` now consumes the hook and keeps composition/orchestration wiring. Bug sniffing hardening included: edits cache now persists even when empty, preventing stale cached edits from being resurrected after reset paths. Added source-contract and hook-behavior guardrails (`tests/contract/cms-editor-phase5-shell-state-hook-extraction.test.ts`, `tests/unit/cms-editor-shell-state-hook.test.ts`) to lock the new ownership boundary.

items.title: CmsEditor monolith decomposition - phase 6 collections render extraction
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-08 on `codex/cms-editor-decomp-phase6`. Extracted the collection/item render monolith from `src/components/CmsEditor.tsx` into `src/components/cms-editor/CmsEditorCollections.tsx`, including collection header badges, item-level editor controls, AI variation selectors, inline approval history, and preview panels. `CmsEditor.tsx` now composes the extracted renderer and remains focused on orchestration. Bug sniffing hardening included: phase-1 contract assertions were updated to stop pinning now-extracted render helper usage in root (`filterAndRankCollectionItems`) while preserving model ownership checks, and a pre-existing purple paired-description label was corrected to blue to align with color-system rules. Added source-contract guardrails (`tests/contract/cms-editor-phase6-collections-render-extraction.test.ts`) to lock the phase-6 ownership boundary.

items.title: CmsEditor monolith decomposition - phase 7 shell panel + save workflow cleanup
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-08 on `codex/cms-editor-decomp-phase7`. Extracted root shell chrome (header actions, bulk rewrite state UI, approval/error panels, tracking summary, search bar) from `src/components/CmsEditor.tsx` into `src/components/cms-editor/CmsEditorShellPanels.tsx`, and moved per-item save mutation orchestration into `src/components/cms-editor/useCmsEditorSaveWorkflow.ts`. `CmsEditor.tsx` now stays composition-first (220 lines) and wires extracted modules plus existing workflow hooks. Bug sniffing hardening included: added unit coverage for the no-edit early-return guard in save workflow so API calls are blocked when no editable payload exists for an item. Added phase-7 source contract guardrails (`tests/contract/cms-editor-phase7-shell-save-cleanup.test.ts`) and dedicated save workflow unit coverage (`tests/unit/cms-editor-save-workflow.test.ts`). This closes the remaining CmsEditor decomposition surface for this sprint.

items.title: PageRewriteChat monolith decomposition - phase 1 contracts + shared model extraction
items.source: Loop follow-up after CmsEditor phase 7 merge
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-08 on `codex/page-rewrite-chat-decomp-phase1`. Extracted PageRewriteChat contracts/constants/pure helpers into `src/components/page-rewrite-chat/pageRewriteChatModel.ts` (page/chat/sitemap types, heading-class map, quick prompts, section-slug/indent helpers, URL-query detection helper, session-id builder) and rewired `src/components/PageRewriteChat.tsx` to consume the module while preserving behavior. Bug sniffing hardening included: URL query detection now trims whitespace before checking protocol prefixes, and URL load call sites pass `comboQuery.trim()` to keep the URL path explicit. Added unit coverage (`tests/unit/page-rewrite-chat-model.test.ts`) and source-contract guardrails (`tests/contract/page-rewrite-chat-phase1-model-extraction.test.ts`) to prevent model/helper drift back into the root shell.

items.title: PageRewriteChat monolith decomposition - phase 2 document helpers extraction
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-08 on `codex/page-rewrite-chat-decomp-phase2`. Extracted document-focused assembly/serialization helpers from `src/components/PageRewriteChat.tsx` into `src/components/page-rewrite-chat/pageRewriteChatDocument.ts` (`buildDocHtml`, `serializeDocToMarkdown`, `serializeDocToDocx`) and rewired root export/document initialization calls to consume the module while preserving behavior. Bug sniffing hardening included: deep nested section body paragraphs now use explicit inline `margin-left` styling in generated HTML so level-4+ section indentation is applied consistently (replacing dynamic class fragments that do not materialize at runtime). Added source-contract guardrails (`tests/contract/page-rewrite-chat-phase2-document-extraction.test.ts`) and serializer coverage updates (`tests/unit/rewrite-export-serializer.test.ts`) to lock ownership and behavior.

items.title: PageRewriteChat monolith decomposition - phase 3 editor actions extraction
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-08 on `codex/page-rewrite-chat-decomp-phase3`. Extracted editor action workflow from `src/components/PageRewriteChat.tsx` into `src/components/page-rewrite-chat/pageRewriteChatActions.ts` (`execFormatCommand`, `clearFormattingSelection`, `wrapSelectionHeading`, `applyRewriteToSection`) and rewired root toolbar/apply handlers to consume the module while preserving behavior. Bug sniffing hardening included: missing section targets now surface an explicit toast (`Section not found — content inserted at end`) instead of silently appending. Added source-contract guardrails (`tests/contract/page-rewrite-chat-phase3-actions-extraction.test.ts`) and behavior coverage (`tests/unit/page-rewrite-chat-actions.test.ts`) to lock ownership and section-apply fallback behavior.

items.title: PageRewriteChat monolith decomposition - phase 4 document pane extraction
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-08 on `codex/page-rewrite-chat-decomp-phase4`. Extracted the full right-side editable document pane from `src/components/PageRewriteChat.tsx` into `src/components/page-rewrite-chat/PageRewriteDocumentPane.tsx`, including empty/loading/error states, loaded-page header/export UI, issue-chip rendering, contenteditable surface, and formatting-toolbar rendering. Root shell now composes the pane while preserving document hydration/export/orchestration behavior. Bug sniffing hardening included: export popover now closes on `Escape` for keyboard dismissal. Added source-contract guardrails (`tests/contract/page-rewrite-chat-phase4-document-pane-extraction.test.ts`) to lock right-pane ownership.

items.title: PageRewriteChat monolith decomposition - phase 5 chat pane extraction
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-08 on `codex/page-rewrite-chat-decomp-phase5`. Extracted the full left-side chat pane from `src/components/PageRewriteChat.tsx` into `src/components/page-rewrite-chat/PageRewriteChatPane.tsx`, including empty-state hero/quick prompts, user+assistant message rendering with rewrite apply/copy controls, sending-state row, and input composer/send UI. Root shell now composes the pane while preserving message/page orchestration, rewrite application, and export/document workflows. Added source-contract guardrails (`tests/contract/page-rewrite-chat-phase5-chat-pane-extraction.test.ts`) to lock left-pane ownership.

items.title: PageRewriteChat monolith decomposition - phase 6 header and picker extraction
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-08 on `codex/page-rewrite-chat-decomp-phase6`. Extracted the top header and sitemap/URL picker from `src/components/PageRewriteChat.tsx` into `src/components/page-rewrite-chat/PageRewriteHeaderBar.tsx`, including back/focus controls, loaded-page chip, search/paste combobox rendering, URL-load CTA, and empty-state messaging. Root shell now composes the header while preserving workflow state/orchestration handlers. Bug sniffing hardening included: sitemap options now key by `slug+url` to avoid duplicate-key rendering drift when slugs collide. Added source-contract guardrails (`tests/contract/page-rewrite-chat-phase6-header-extraction.test.ts`) to lock header/picker ownership.

items.title: PageRewriteChat monolith decomposition - phase 7 shell workflow hook extraction
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-08 on `codex/page-rewrite-chat-decomp-phase7`. Extracted root shell orchestration from `src/components/PageRewriteChat.tsx` into `src/components/page-rewrite-chat/usePageRewriteChatShell.ts`, including page/chat/document state, lifecycle effects, sitemap query wiring, combo interactions, rewrite apply flow, export workflow, and formatting handlers. `PageRewriteChat.tsx` now composes the extracted hook and view modules while preserving behavior. Bug sniffing hardening included: clipboard copy failures now surface toast feedback, and DOCX export failures now use non-blocking toast feedback instead of `alert()`. Added source-contract guardrails (`tests/contract/page-rewrite-chat-phase7-shell-hook-extraction.test.ts`) to lock shell workflow ownership.

items.title: Workspace intelligence - split slice assemblers behind stable API
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-07. server/workspace-intelligence.ts now remains the public facade while prompt formatting and slice assemblers live under server/intelligence/*. Preserved facade exports and pageElements behavior, added cache-key isolation for siteInventory by site identity/token fingerprint, replaced the touched AEO review raw JSON.parse path with validated parsing, and extended pr-check/tests so extracted formatter and SEO-context modules remain covered. See FEATURE_AUDIT entry 357.

items.title: Workspace intelligence follow-up - retire deprecated seo-context builder
items.source: Follow-up surfaced during workspace intelligence decomposition review
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-07. Deleted server/seo-context.ts after moving RICH_BLOCKS_PROMPT to server/prompt-rich-blocks.ts and raw brand/knowledge plus voice-authority helpers to server/intelligence/seo-context-source.ts. assembleSeoContext now computes effectiveBrandVoiceBlock directly, schema context reads knowledge/personas from the seoContext slice, old clearSeoContextCache callers use invalidateIntelligenceCache, and pr-check now hard-blocks production imports from the retired module. See FEATURE_AUDIT entry 358.

items.title: Schema context - finish direct-read to intelligence-slice migration
items.source: Follow-up surfaced during workspace intelligence decomposition review
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-07. Follow-up audit confirmed the Pattern B migration was functionally completed during SEO context retirement: buildSchemaContext reads businessContext, knowledgeBase, personas, siteKeywords, and business profile from `buildWorkspaceIntelligence({ slices: ['seoContext'] })`, while direct workspace reads are identity/analytics-only. This pass removed obsolete `schema-context-direct-read-ok` hatches in server/helpers.ts so the function now relies on the allow-list rule directly.

items.title: Keyword strategy - retire legacy direct/compatibility generation paths
items.source: Follow-up surfaced during workspace intelligence decomposition review
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-07. Removed obsolete frontend compatibility wrappers after the background-job migration: deleted the unused `keywords.generateStrategy` route-fetch helper and `streamKeywordStrategy` SSE helper from `src/api/seo.ts`, removed the now-dead SSE parser from `src/api/streamUtils.ts`, and updated the global fetch-auth comment in `src/main.tsx` to match remaining NDJSON usage. Added a contract guard (`tests/contract/keyword-strategy-compat-retirement.test.ts`) that pins job orchestration via `startJob(BACKGROUND_JOB_TYPES.KEYWORD_STRATEGY)` and blocks reintroduction of the retired direct-generation wrappers.

items.title: SEO provider boundary - retire Semrush-named compatibility exports
items.source: Follow-up surfaced during workspace intelligence decomposition review
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-07. Removed the provider-neutral helper compatibility bridge from `server/semrush.ts` (`trendDirection`, `parseSerpFeatures`, `hasSerpOpportunity`) and migrated remaining test imports to `server/seo-provider-signals.ts`. Updated `tests/contract/seo-provider-boundary.test.ts` to block reintroduction of the semrush re-export bridge and require direct provider-neutral helper imports in the touched strategy/semrush suites.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Completed items from Future (Historical Done/Deferred Archive)
