sprints.notes: Extracted on 2026-06-11. Original sprint retained pending/in-progress/deferred items only.

items.title: Schema Page-Element Catalog PR1 — slice + 3 element types + 3 schema integrations
items.notes: PageElementSlice + page_elements table + extractors for videos/HowTo/citations + VideoObject/HowTo/Article.citation[] schema integrations on Article + BlogPosting. No AI in PR1. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-29-page-element-catalog-design.md. Audit: docs/superpowers/audits/2026-04-29-page-element-catalog-audit.md.

items.title: Schema Page-Element Catalog PR2 — images + tables + testimonials
items.notes: Shipped 3 pattern extractors (images w/ rule-based hero/informative/decorative + AI vision classifier; tables w/ pricing+comparison heuristics; testimonials w/ author+rating) + 2 AI extractors (vision image-role classifier via openai SDK direct, HowTo disambiguation via callAI) behind schema-ai-element-classifier flag (default off, 120-call shared per-run AiBudget). Threaded one AiBudget per regenerate-all through generateSchemaSuggestions's 3 generateLeanSchema sites (Devin r5 follow-up). Added 4 validator REQUIRED_BY_TYPE entries (Review/AggregateRating/Table/ImageGallery) + 3 schema integrations: ImageGallery (Article+Service), Review[]+AggregateRating (Service+LocalBusiness), Table mainEntity (Service). Pre-emission gates on every new node type (synchronous, per PR1 Devin r2 lesson). 4 new HTML fixtures + 6 new test files + extended integration tests.

items.title: Schema Workstream C — Entity Graph Hub Dispatch
items.notes: Workstream C shipped: hub pages now emit semantically correct schema types with cross-page @id references via assembleSiteContext + SiteContext plumbing into generateLeanSchema. BlogIndex → Blog with blogPost[] (@id refs, sorted newest-first, capped at 10, numberOfItems = true count). ServiceIndex → Service + hasOfferCatalog: { @type: OfferCatalog, hasPart[] }. CaseStudyIndex → CollectionPage + mainEntity: { @type: ItemList, itemListElement[] (positional ListItems) }. All three fall back to CollectionPage when siteContext is absent. Non-hub pages (BlogPosting, Service, AboutPage, etc.) unchanged. 18 integration tests in tests/integration/schema-entity-graph.test.ts.

items.title: Schema Semantic Extraction & AI-Powered Generation
items.notes: AI-powered universal page content extraction layer for schema generation. extractSemanticData() (Haiku 4.5 tool_use) extracts phone, address, hours, staff, services, aggregateRating, sameAs, faq, primaryImage per page — stored on PageElementCatalog.semantics. applyPostEnrichment() appends FAQPage/AggregateRating/sameAs/VideoObject nodes to generated schema using extracted semantics with rollback-on-new-errors safety. generateSchemaForUnknownType() generates WebPage-classified pages with non-empty semantics via second Haiku call + static SCHEMA_TYPE_REFERENCE. Validator extended with DEDICATED_VALIDATOR_TYPES guard, unverified-type warnings for unknown Schema.org types, addressCountry in ContactPage. GSC URL Inspection integration: inspectUrlForRichResults() calls GSC API 3 minutes after publish, stores google_validation_status on schema_publish_history. schema.org pre-publish validator: validateWithSchemaOrg() fires at generation time (fire-and-forget, logs only). Migrations 081 (google_validation_status on schema_publish_history) + 082 (schema_org_validation_status on schema_snapshots). WS_EVENTS.SCHEMA_GOOGLE_VALIDATION added. 9 new/modified test files; 5805 tests passing.

items.title: Migrate buildSchemaContext direct reads to intelligence slices
items.notes: Completed 2026-05-07. buildSchemaContext now reads schema context from `buildWorkspaceIntelligence({ slices: ['seoContext'] })` for businessContext, knowledgeBase, personas, siteKeywords, and business profile (including structured address + foundedDate/numberOfEmployees via seoContext.businessProfile). Legacy `ctx.brandVoice` assignment was removed as dead schema context. Remaining direct reads are identity-only (`ws.name`, `ws.id`, `ws.liveDomain`, `ws.brandLogoUrl`, `ws.siteHasSearch`, `_siteId`) plus analytics maps, matching the allowlist intent behind `schema-context-direct-read-not-on-allowlist`.

items.title: Reset aiLimiter in beforeEach for brandscript-hardening I14 burst-cap
items.notes: Verified during 2026-05-03 flake-hardening pass: no duplicate reset hook needed. brandscript-hardening and brand-identity I14 already isolate aiLimiter by creating a fresh workspace per test, and rateLimit keys include req.path with the workspaceId. Targeted run passed alongside the other flake files.

items.title: Add missing exports to outcome-tracking.js mock factory
items.notes: Fixed during 2026-05-03 flake-hardening pass. Added stable no-op getActionsByWorkspace/getPendingActions/getTopWinsFromActions coverage to outcome-tracking mocks used by workspace-intelligence-related tests so dynamic imports no longer see partial mock shapes. Targeted run passed.

items.title: Investigate content-decay-routes graceful-degradation timeout in full-suite mode
items.notes: Fixed during 2026-05-03 flake-hardening pass. The test server now inherits OPENAI_API_KEY='' so callOpenAI fails synchronously through the missing-key guard instead of retrying a fake provider key. The route still returns 200 with fallback recommendations. Targeted run passed.

items.title: Schema Pillar 2.1 — Stop emitting SearchAction on sites without search
items.notes: Pillar 2's homepage + LocalBusiness templates emitted `potentialAction: SearchAction` unconditionally. Google's docs require the site actually expose a working search endpoint at the urlTemplate; emitting it on a site without search misrepresents capability. Fix: dropped SearchAction emission until a workspace-level signal indicates site search is available. Re-add as opt-in via Workspace.siteHasSearch (or auto-detect from homepage HTML <form action=/search>) is queued under schema-yoast-parity-fields.

items.title: Schema Pillar 1 — Raise the Validator Bar
items.notes: REQUIRED_BY_TYPE in validator.ts now enforces Yoast/Google-baseline completeness. Article/BlogPosting require image+dateModified+articleSection+isPartOf+breadcrumb+inLanguage. WebPage variants require description+isPartOf+breadcrumb+inLanguage. LocalBusiness requires address+telephone+inLanguage. WebSite requires inLanguage (potentialAction is conditional, deferred to schema-yoast-parity-fields where it gates on Workspace.siteHasSearch). Organization requires logo. Cross-ref validators reject malformed isPartOf/breadcrumb shapes and dangling BreadcrumbList @id pointers. NEW value-shape validators reject malformed Article author/publisher/image, non-ISO 8601 dates, non-contiguous breadcrumb positions, and non-absolute URLs on primary nodes. Locks the bar Pillars 2 + 2.1 raised. 24 new test assertions across required-fields, cross-ref shape, and value-shape describe blocks.

items.title: Schema Yoast-Parity Fields PR1 — validator API + 6 fields + slice-migration starter
items.notes: ValidationFinding API (typed { severity, type, field?, ruleId, message }) + 6 new template fields (Service.areaServed, Service.serviceType, LocalBusiness.areaServed, Organization.knowsAbout, Article.keywords, gated WebSite.potentialAction) + Workspace.siteHasSearch field plumbing (default false) + slice-migration starter (siteKeywords + per-page pageKeywords moved to seoContext slice consumption) + new pr-check rule schema-context-direct-read-not-on-allowlist + CLAUDE.md convention paragraph + roadmap migration tracker entry (schema-context-builder-pattern-b-migration). 5 dead SchemaContext._* fields deleted (3 preserved per audit). Frontend renders findings grouped by severity (errors red, warnings amber 'Recommended'). PR2 ships admin discoverability surfaces. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-29-schema-yoast-parity-fields-design.md. Audit: docs/superpowers/audits/2026-04-29-schema-yoast-parity-fields-audit.md.

items.title: Schema Yoast-Parity Fields PR2 — admin discoverability surfaces
items.notes: Admin discoverability layer atop PR1's typed validationFindings. SchemaCompletenessWidget on the Schema page aggregates findings across all pages with progress bar + missing-field deep-link buttons. BusinessProfileTab gains a 'Schema impact' read-only mirror SectionCard listing 5 schema-impacting fields with ✓/✗ status + deep-links (cross-tab via Link with ?tab=...&focus=..., in-tab via scroll-to-element). FeaturesTab gains Logo URL microcopy + new 'Site capabilities' SectionCard with the siteHasSearch checkbox (toggling on activates PR1's gated WebSite.potentialAction emission). SchemaPageCard now groups findings by field with click-to-expand collapsible rows when a single field has 2+ findings on a page. SchemaSuggester header gains 'X fixes available' annotation. New shared useDeepLinkFocus hook + data-schema-deeplink attribute convention establishes the field-level deep-link two-halves contract. New fieldTargets.ts module is the single source of truth mapping ValidationFinding.field → Settings deep-link. Frontend-only; no backend changes. 8 new component tests (3 hook + 5 widget). Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-29-schema-yoast-parity-fields-pr2.md.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Send to Client Expansion

items.title: AEO Review: Send to Client per-page changes
items.notes:
Add per-page Send to Client button to AEO Review change cards. Each recommended change (rewrite_intro, add_faq, add_section, etc.) should be sendable to the client approval queue with current→suggested diff as the approval payload.
Shipped / verified 2026-05-06: AeoReview sends page-level client actions with sourceType 'aeo_change', sourceId `aeo:${page.pageUrl}`, client-ready change filtering, and payload.page for client review.

items.title: Internal Links: Send to Client link suggestions
items.notes:
Add Send to Client button per page in Internal Links results. Sends suggested link insertions (anchor text, target URL, context snippet) to client approval queue so client can approve before agency implements.
Shipped / verified 2026-05-06 as a filtered-batch client action: InternalLinks has a Send to Client action that packages the currently filtered link suggestions with sourceType 'internal_link' and summary metadata. It is not a literal per-page button, but the client-reviewable link-suggestion workflow is live.

items.title: Keyword Strategy: Send to Client strategy recommendations
items.notes:
Add bulk Send to Client for keyword strategy tabs (Quick Wins, Content Gaps, Low Hanging Fruit). Packages selected recommendations into approval batch for client review before implementation.
Shipped / verified 2026-05-06: KeywordStrategy has a Send to Client action with sourceType 'keyword_strategy' that packages mapped pages, quick wins, content gaps, opportunities, and low-hanging fruit into the client action queue.

items.title: Redirect Manager: Send to Client redirect proposals
items.notes:
Add Send to Client for proposed redirects (broken links, chain fixes). Client reviews source→target mappings before agency publishes them to Webflow.
Shipped / verified 2026-05-06: RedirectManager sends accepted redirect proposals to the client action queue with sourceType 'redirect_proposal' and source/target rule payloads.

items.title: Content Decay: Send to Client refresh recommendations
items.notes:
Add Send to Client for decaying content pages. Sends page title, traffic decline data, and recommended action (refresh, merge, redirect) to client for awareness/approval.
Shipped / verified 2026-05-06: ContentDecay exposes per-page Send to Client on AI refresh recommendation cards and creates sourceType 'content_decay' client actions with the decaying page payload.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Deep Bug Remediation
sprints.rationale: Follow-up queue from docs/superpowers/audits/2026-05-04-deep-bug-audit.md. Focuses on systemic correctness issues found after PR #440: workspace/resource scoping, test isolation, path identity joins, client contract drift, content invalidation, and AI provenance.

items.title: Security scoping PR 1 - Webflow/site ownership guard
items.notes: Added shared requireWorkspaceSiteAccess guard proving workspace -> Webflow site ownership before token lookup or resource mutation. Applied it to Webflow asset/page/publish routes, CMS collection item read/write/publish routes, organize/rename routes, schema site routes, Smart Name, SEO copy, and guarded Webflow job/content-publish surfaces. Threaded workspaceId through scoped admin callers and added cross-workspace JWT integration tests plus owned-site positive-path coverage for schema validation, Smart Name, and SEO copy.

items.title: Test isolation - per-suite DB plus ROI page_keywords read path
items.notes: Added per-worker isolated Vitest DATA_DIR setup before DB singleton import, made spawned integration servers inherit the worker DATA_DIR, shared awaited child-process shutdown across raw-spawn suites, and extended the port uniqueness meta-test to raw server PORT constants. ROI now reads normalized page_keywords rows as source of truth with legacy pageMap fallback, covered by a public ROI integration test that strips legacy pageMap.

items.title: Security scoping PR 2 - Google, reports, global lists, settings, billing, uploads
items.notes: Hardened Google/GSC/GA admin data routes with workspace-site and GSC-property ownership checks, made global Google/settings writes require HMAC admin auth, filtered workspace list and overview responses for scoped JWT users, guarded audit report/snapshot/action routes by owning workspace, required workspace access before uploads, and added authenticated-actor-only billing management for passwordless portals. Added targeted scoped-JWT and passwordless-route regression tests across Google, reports, settings, billing, uploads, and workspace list/overview.

items.title: Page identity joins - normalize remaining page/profile/chat/recommendation lookups
items.notes: Replaced remaining fuzzy/raw page identity joins with exact shared identity helpers across admin chat pageMap lookup, workspace intelligence SEO-context/insights/page-profile joins, audit/CWV/schema/link/SEO edit/content-decay matching, and frontend recommendation filtering. Added frontend/server helper parity tests plus regression coverage for homepage identities, full URLs with query/hash, nested pages, and sibling leaf paths like /seo vs /services/seo.

items.title: Client API contract drift - trials, strategy enrichment, delivery links, priorities
items.notes: Use computeEffectiveTier in all public tier-gated routes, expose content-gap enrichment fields used by the client strategy UI, include deliveryUrl/deliveryNotes for delivered/published public content requests, and align client business priority storage with ClientSignalsSlice reads. Added contract/integration tests for each producer-consumer pair.

items.title: Content data flow - broadcasts, activity, and derived cache invalidation
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-04: added a centralized content:updated workspace event for content-planning/content-pipeline mutations and wired it through the shared WS invalidation bus. Content templates, matrices, content-plan review actions, briefs, post generation/regeneration/revert/delete, and publish-related handlers now refresh admin pipeline/calendar/home/intelligence/ROI plus client content plan/content request caches. Added user-visible activity entries for template/matrix/brief/post lifecycle actions, fixed read-before-delete for brief/post/template/matrix deletes, made client-flagged content-plan cells a real shared status, and added route coverage proving flagged cells stay visible and activity is recorded.

items.title: AI provenance contracts - factual checklist, AEO citations, response parsing
items.notes: Shipped 2026-05-04: provenance-sensitive post review checklist items are never auto-checked from AI-only review and are marked human-review required; AEO citation recommendations now require verified source evidence or carry a research-needed flag and are omitted from client handoff until verified; AEO effort values are normalized/validated to exact enum literals; rewrite-chat responses use BEGIN_REWRITE/END_REWRITE delimiters and editor apply/copy paths consume only the rewrite body. Added route, component, and unit coverage for the contracts.

items.title: CWV field-data vs Lighthouse lab score — dedicated summary card
items.notes: Shipped — CWV data moved out of siteWideIssues into dedicated cwvSummary on audit response. Frontend renders as a prominent card with mobile + desktop columns, per-metric ratings (LCP/INP/CLS), pass/fail badges, and Lighthouse lab score as secondary. Only Lighthouse lab score remains in siteWideIssues as info. Updated CSV/HTML report exports and client portal types.

items.title: Fix AI + SEMRush usage data loss on restart — disk-based queries
items.notes: Shipped — Both openai-helpers.ts and semrush.ts had a MAX_MEMORY_LOG=1000 cap that truncated usage data on startup. Query functions (getTokenUsage, getUsageByDay, getUsageByFeature, getSemrushUsage, getSemrushByDay, getTimeSaved) only read from the truncated in-memory array, so data appeared to vanish after restarts even though disk files were intact. Fix: removed in-memory array entirely, all query functions now read directly from disk JSON files via loadEntriesFromDisk()/loadCreditsFromDisk(). Write buffer (pendingWrites) kept for debounced disk writes only.

items.title: Platform-wide CWV integration — chatbot, monthly reports, InsightsDigest, HealthTab
items.notes: Shipped — CWV data now surfaces across 10 platform surfaces: (1) Client HealthTab card with mobile/desktop pass/fail and plain-language metrics, (2) Client AI chatbot context — cwvSummary added to siteHealthDetail so chatbot answers speed questions, server prompt updated with CWV data inventory line, (3) Monthly report emails — new Page Speed section with Mobile/Desktop speed badges and Lighthouse scores between score ring and traffic stats, (4) InsightsDigest — proactive 'Page speed: Passed/Needs Work' insight card on client Overview tab. Also: admin SeoAudit card, admin AI chat, audit report exports (CSV+HTML), AI recommendations engine, applySuppressionsToAudit pass-through fix.

items.title: Approval batch retract — pull back sent approvals from client view
items.notes: Shipped — New PendingApprovals component shows all pending/partial approval batches with Retract button. Inline confirmation dialog prevents accidental deletes. Expandable item details show per-item approval status. Wired into SeoEditor (nameFilter='SEO'), SchemaSuggester (nameFilter='Schema'), CmsEditor (nameFilter='CMS'). Each tool auto-refreshes the panel after sending new batches. API client method approvals.remove() calls existing DELETE /api/approvals/:workspaceId/:batchId endpoint that had no frontend wiring before. Also added approvals.list() admin endpoint wrapper.

items.title: Audit cleanup: CASCADE migration, stale API modules, recommendation specificity, noindex filtering
items.notes: Shipped — (1) Migration 019: ON DELETE CASCADE for 20+ workspace_id FKs that previously orphaned rows on workspace delete. (2) Fixed stale API module paths: recommendations, keywords.analyze, seoChangeTracker.impact, competitor endpoints now match actual backend routes. (3) Site-wide recommendations (duplicate titles, orphan pages) now list specific affected pages with traffic data instead of 'affects all pages'. affectedPages field added to SeoIssue type. (4) 'Pages needing attention' on HealthTab now filters out noindex pages since their issues don't affect search performance.

items.title: Content gap enrichment: SEMRush volume/KD + GSC impressions on content opportunities

items.title: Process: pre-implementation guardrail generation for multi-phase features
items.notes: Before starting any multi-phase or cross-system feature: (1) analyze spec for error-prone patterns, (2) write CLAUDE.md rules for reusable patterns, (3) create .windsurf/rules/<feature>.md for feature-specific contracts, (4) embed per-phase acceptance checklists in the implementation plan. items.title: Cross-Provider Keyword & Backlink Hardening (A3/A4 fixes)
items.notes: Shipped — PR #218. (1) serpFeatures carry: competitorKeywordData now includes optional serpFeatures field to preserve SERP feature data from both DFS and SEMRush (previously silently dropped). (2) Provider date normalization: normalizeProviderDate() helper converts raw Unix epoch timestamps and string dates from SEMRush and DataForSEO to ISO-8601 format at provider boundary — prevents 'Invalid Date' in referring-domain dates. (3) Competitor keyword limits: Full-mode fetch raised 100 → 200; SEMRush overfetches 2× + sorts by volume to match DFS ordering. (4) Regression guards: Two pr-check rules guard against provider date/serpFeatures loss. Feature #300.

items.title: Webflow Nested Page Path Hardening Sprint
items.notes: All 8 bugs fixed (BUG-0001 through BUG-0008). resolvePagePath adopted at 15+ sites. applyBulkKeywordGuards moved to helpers. GSC path-boundary matching. bare-slug-pagepath pr-check rule added.

items.title: SEO Tier 3 Data Source Enrichment
items.notes: Six discrete backend enrichments across SEO pipelines: (Item 12) GSC queries as keyword candidates in keyword-recommendations.ts; (Item 13) GSC query breakdown in content-decay refresh AI prompt; (Item 13b) Decay query context injected when brief matches decaying page; (Item 13c) DecayContext.topQueries from GSC in copy-refresh AI prompt; (Item 14) SEMRush metrics pre-fetch for top-N pages in jobs.ts bulk analyze; (Item 15) Issue-type-specific recovery rates replacing flat 12% in recommendations.ts. All six independent, no API/UI changes, no new DB columns or shared types.

items.title: Schema Generator One-Shot Quality Hardening
items.notes: 7 targeted fixes to schema output quality and intelligence wiring. (1) UTILITY_SLUGS constant — single regex applied at hasPart/relatedLink injections and generation queue pre-filter. (2) SiteNavigationElement block deleted from postProcessSchema; removed from PAGE_TYPE_SCHEMA_MAP homepage secondary array. (3) CollectionPage injection guarded with pagePath !== '/'. (4) upgradeHealthcareType() deterministic fallback: businessContext → Dentist/Physician/Optician/Chiropractor/MedicalClinic/Hospital/MedicalBusiness. (5) autoFixSchema: knowsAbout trimmed ≤5, Product zero-price offers stripped, SiteNavigationElement nodes stripped. (6) INVALID_PROPERTIES expanded with Product: ['pricing', 'features', 'cost']. (7) Prompt: healthcare rule promoted to 3b with expanded trigger keywords; Product zero-price guard added as 9b; SiteNavigationElement removed from homepage instructions. (8) Intelligence context: _serpFeatures + _backlinkReferringDomains from workspace intelligence layer (non-blocking); _existingErrors from schema_validations at all 3 call sites. (9) Declined keywords filtered before context assembly. (10) BusinessProfileTab amber warning for empty profile on local-business workspace. Audit: docs/superpowers/audits/2026-04-28-schema-generator-audit.md.

items.title: Lean Schema Generation Rewrite
items.notes: Replaces 2,558-line schema-suggester.ts pipeline with deterministic 6-module package at server/schema/. URL classifier + per-type templates + canonical data sources + 2 surgical AI extractors (description, FAQ) + per-type validator + thin orchestrator. Output ~72% smaller, validates first time, eliminates duplicate WebPage bug and wrong-type bug for case studies/privacy/index pages. Common types only (BlogPosting, Article, Service, Product, LocalBusiness, AboutPage, ContactPage, CollectionPage, WebPage, Organization, WebSite). Healthcare uses LocalBusiness fallback; subtype escalation deferred to schema-intelligence-layer-v2.

items.title: Schema Pillar 2 — Data Wiring & Cross-References
items.notes: Brand-suffix scrubber strips ' | Brand'/' - Brand'/' — Brand'/' · Brand' from name fields and breadcrumb leaves. Every non-homepage primary node emits isPartOf (→#website), breadcrumb (→#breadcrumb), inLanguage (Yoast-baseline @graph topology). Article emits articleSection (URL-derived) and Person author when CMS fieldData exposes one. New discoverCmsItemsBySlug joins sitemap URLs against /collections/:id/items so CMS pages get real datePublished + author from fieldData. Homepage Organization gains sameAs+foundedDate from BusinessProfile; WebSite gains potentialAction (sitelinks SearchAction). Default locale extracted from Webflow site.locales.primary.tag via extended listSites and SchemaContext._defaultLocale. Locks via 4 integration assertions. Closes wiring gaps from 2026-04-29 audits. Pillar 1 (validator bar) and Pillar 3 (compile + CI gates) ship next.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Broadcast Invalidation Audit (do next)
sprints.rationale: Recurring UX symptom: components show stale/empty data on first mount and 'fix themselves' on hard refresh. Root cause pattern — long staleTime React Query hooks without a useWorkspaceEvents broadcast subscription (violates Data Flow Rule #2). PageIntelligence is the confirmed instance; likely a platform-wide class of bug.

items.source: User report 2026-04-21 — 'page intelligence doesn't display data at first, but then on refresh it does'

Added useWorkspaceEvents subscription to src/components/PageIntelligence.tsx that invalidates queryKeys.admin.keywordStrategy on STRATEGY_UPDATED broadcasts. Resolves staleTime 10min cache-miss UX where users saw empty data until hard refresh. #597 (platform-wide audit) still pending.

items.title: Platform-wide audit: useQuery hooks with staleTime but no broadcast subscription
items.notes: Shipped 2026-04-21. Centralized 7 workspace-scoped events in src/hooks/useWsInvalidation.ts (STRATEGY_UPDATED, BRANDSCRIPT_UPDATED, DISCOVERY_UPDATED, VOICE_PROFILE_UPDATED, BRAND_IDENTITY_UPDATED, BLUEPRINT_UPDATED, BLUEPRINT_GENERATED — total centralized now 43). Removed redundant inline useWorkspaceEvents subscriptions from 10 component files (PageIntelligence, SeoEditor, KeywordStrategy, VoiceTab, IdentityTab, BrandscriptTab, DiscoveryTab, PageStrategyTab, BlueprintDetail, BlueprintVersionHistory). Added two-layer regression guardrail: pr-check rule (self-syncing allowlist parsed from useWsInvalidation.ts, escape hatch `// ws-invalidation-ok`) catches reintroduced inline handlers; contract test (tests/contract/ws-invalidation-coverage.test.ts) catches new WS_EVENTS entries added without either centralization or an explicit LOCAL_ONLY_EVENTS rationale. Blueprint queries rely on React Query prefix invalidation (['admin-blueprint', wsId] / ['admin-blueprint-versions', wsId]).

items.title: AI insight validation pass (quality gate on surfaced insights)
items.notes: Shipped — deterministic rules-based validation pass (validateInsightBatch) inserted into computeAndPersistInsights pipeline after all insight types computed, before feedback loops. Three rule categories: (1) contradiction suppression — ranking_opportunity+content_decay and ctr_opportunity+content_decay on same page suppress weaker signal, (2) severity clash — positive+critical on same page suppresses positive, (3) low-confidence suppression — ranking_opportunity <100 impressions or <5 traffic gain, content_decay <10 absolute click loss, ctr_opportunity <5 click gap. Added suppressInsights batch-delete helper to analytics-insights-store. 11 unit tests covering all rule categories + no-op scenarios.

items.title: Assembler catch hardening — distinguish programming errors from expected degradation

Upgraded all 64 catch blocks in workspace-intelligence.ts: 3 HIGH-risk dynamic-import blocks get isProgrammingError split → log.warn on TypeError/ReferenceError; 43 SILENT blocks upgraded to log.debug; 2 intentionally-silent invalidateIntelligenceCache catches annotated with // catch-ok. Also applied to content-decay.ts, keyword-recommendations.ts, routes/misc.ts. Compile-time import type contracts added for HIGH-risk modules. Backlog #14/#15/#16/#17 resolved in same pass. pr-check rule added.

items.title: Broad server catch hardening — extend isProgrammingError to 344 silent catches outside workspace-intelligence.ts
items.notes: Shipped — hardened 344 bare `} catch {` blocks across 90 server files. Pattern: (1) `} catch (err) { if (isProgrammingError(err)) log.warn(...)` for standard catches, (2) `log.debug` for JSON-parse and migration catches (expected degradation), (3) `// catch-ok` annotation for intentionally-silent catches. Added createLogger imports to 23 files that previously had no logger. Expanded pr-check rule from workspace-intelligence.ts-only to all server/ files. Top files hardened: admin-chat-context.ts (26), routes/keyword-strategy.ts (21), db/migrate-json.ts (18), routes/webflow-seo.ts (17). sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — SEMRush API Cost Optimization
sprints.goal: Reduce SEMRush credit consumption by 40-60% without degrading strategy quality

items.title: Extend SEMRush cache TTLs by data volatility
items.notes: Shipped — Named TTL constants: keyword metrics 7d→30d, related/questions 7d→30d, domain overview 48h→7d, backlinks 48h→7d, competitors 72h→14d. Domain organic stays at 7d (rankings shift weekly). ~10-20% fewer cache misses on repeat operations.

items.title: Unify domain organic fetch limit to prevent cache misses
items.notes: Shipped — Strategy gen fetched limit=100 (quick) or limit=200 (full), but getKeywordGap internally re-fetches client domain with limit=200. Different limit = different cache key = duplicate API call. Standardized to 200 for all modes.

items.title: Global cross-workspace keyword metrics cache (SQLite)
items.notes: Shipped — keyword_metrics_cache SQLite table with L1/L2 cache chain in getKeywordOverview: L1 (global SQLite) → L2 (per-workspace file) → L3 (SEMRush API). File cache hits backfill global table. API results write to both caches. Saves 30-50% of keyword_overview credits across workspaces in same industry. Feature #178.

items.title: Pre-enrichment deduplication in strategy generation
items.notes: Shipped — Post-AI validation now checks domain organic data (already fetched earlier in the same run) before calling SEMRush API. Combined with #375 (page_keywords skip). Saves ~1,000 credits per strategy run. Feature #178.

items.title: Skip keywords with existing metrics in page_keywords table
items.notes: Shipped — Post-AI validation checks existing page_keywords entries (from previous runs) before calling SEMRush API. On re-runs, 60-90% of validation API calls eliminated since most keywords are unchanged. Combined with global cache (#373) and domain organic dedup (#374). Feature #178.

items.title: Incremental strategy updates (re-analyze changed pages only)
items.notes: Implemented: mode='incremental' param on POST /api/webflow/keyword-strategy/:id. Uses analysis_generated_at (7-day threshold) to split pages into toAnalyze vs toPreserve. Only runs AI batching on stale/new pages; existing keyword rows for fresh pages are left untouched via upsertPageKeywordsBatch instead of upsertAndCleanPageKeywords. Added 'Update changed pages' button in KeywordStrategy.tsx. New competitorLastFetchedAt field on Workspace (migration 052). 8 integration tests pass.

items.notes: Shipped — serpTargeting recommendations generated per content gap with SERP features. Displayed as yellow guidance text in ContentGaps component. Feature #179.

items.title: Phase 4C: Strategy diff — What Changed between runs

items.title: Phase 4D: Prioritized quick wins by ROI score
items.notes: Shipped — ROI score = (volume*(1-difficulty/100))/position. Blue ROI badge in QuickWins. Sorted by score descending. Feature #181.

items.title: Phase 5: DataForSEO migration + provider toggle in Command Center
items.notes: Shipped — SeoDataProvider interface (9 methods) + registry with preferred/fallback. SemrushProvider (zero behavior change). DataForSeoProvider with Basic auth, file cache, credit tracking, circuit breaker. Migration 031. Per-workspace provider toggle in KeywordStrategy settings. Strategy generator + AI usage wired through abstraction. Feature #182.

items.title: Phase 6: CMS Image Optimization — compress + alt text + RichText repair
items.notes: Shipped — GET /api/webflow/cms-images/:siteId scans all collections for Image, MultiImage, and RichText fields. Per-asset usage map with collection + field metadata. Compress endpoint now accepts cmsUsages[] and calls repairCmsReferences() before deleting old asset: Image fields (fileId/url swap), MultiImage (array entry swap), RichText (HTML string URL replacement). Auto-publishes updated CMS items. CmsFieldSelector UI with smart defaults (meta/OG fields unchecked, content fields checked). cms-images and cms-missing-alt filter types in AssetBrowser. Blue CMS badge on AssetCard showing collection → field name. selectedCmsFields state gates both filter and bulk operations. Feature #183.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Architecture → Schema Integration
sprints.rationale: Bridge site architecture tree with schema generation. Deterministic breadcrumbs, unified schema plan, coverage dashboard, priority queue, competitive intelligence, and full pipeline automation.

items.title: [C1] Deterministic BreadcrumbList from architecture tree
items.notes: Shipped — getAncestorChain() + flattenTree() + getCachedArchitecture() in site-architecture.ts. SchemaContext._architectureTree extension. Architecture loaded in routes (webflow-schema + jobs). injectCrossReferences() builds full breadcrumb chain from tree with URL-segment fallback. Feature #169.

items.title: [C2] Unify schema plan with architecture tree input
items.notes: Shipped — PlanContext.architectureResult + flattenTree()-based page list with pageType/depth enrichment. Route loads cached architecture. Falls back to direct API+sitemap when tree unavailable. Feature #170.

items.title: [D1] Page type → schema type mapping + prompt injection
items.notes: Shipped — PAGE_TYPE_SCHEMA_MAP constant mapping all 16 page types to primary/secondary Schema.org types. SCHEMA TYPE GUIDANCE block injected into AI prompt when pageType is set (not 'auto'). Exported for D2/D3 consumption. Feature #143.

items.title: [C3] Schema coverage dashboard in SiteArchitecture UI
items.notes: Shipped — GET /api/site-architecture/:wsId/schema-coverage endpoint, coverage stat card with %, per-node tree badges (checkmark/X), Missing Schema sidebar panel. Feature #172.

items.title: [D2] Template → schema template binding
items.notes: Shipped — schemaTypes on ContentTemplate auto-populated from PAGE_TYPE_SCHEMA_MAP, expectedSchemaTypes inherited by MatrixCell on generation, purple badges in CellDetailPanel. Feature #144.

items.title: [D3] Hub page → CollectionPage/ItemList auto-suggest
items.notes: Shipped — getChildNodes() helper + CollectionPage injection in injectCrossReferences() for pages with 2+ existing children. Feature #144.

items.title: [C4] Internal link health → schema priority queue
items.notes: Shipped — schema coverage endpoint enriched with PageLinkHealth data. Priority scoring: critical (orphan+no schema) → high (< 3 inbound) → medium → low (has schema, poor links). Frontend priority queue panel with badges + orphan tags. Feature #173.

items.title: [C5] SiteNavigationElement auto-gen for homepage
items.notes: Shipped — injectCrossReferences() auto-injects SiteNavigationElement for homepage from depth-1 tree children (existing + hasContent, capped at 10). Feature #171.

items.title: [D5] Sibling/parent-child relationship enrichment
items.notes: Shipped — getParentNode(), getSiblingNodes(), getChildNodes() helpers. isPartOf→parent page, relatedLink→siblings (max 5), hasPart→children injected into WebPage nodes. Feature #144.

items.title: [D4] Competitor schema intelligence
items.notes: Shipped — crawlCompetitorSchemas() + compareSchemas() with 24h file cache, rate-limited fetcher (2 concurrent, 500ms delay, 10s timeout). GET /api/competitor-schema/:workspaceId. Feature #147.

items.title: [C6] Schema impact tracking via GSC before/after
items.notes: Shipped — sourceFilter on getSeoChangeImpact(), getSchemaImpactSummary() with aggregate deltas, /api/schema-impact endpoint, collapsible impact panel in SchemaSuggester with per-deployment GSC before/after. Feature #174.

items.title: [D6] Brief E-E-A-T → author/publisher schema enrichment
items.notes: Shipped — extractEeatFromBrief() extracts author name, credentials, expertise topics from brief eeatGuidance. Injected into AI prompt + post-processing populates Person author on Article/BlogPosting. Feature #148.

items.title: [D7] Planned page schema pre-generation
items.notes: Shipped — generateSchemaSkeleton() builds deterministic JSON-LD from cell + template. pending_schemas SQLite table with pending/applied/stale lifecycle. Triggered async from updateMatrixCell() on brief_generated/approved. GET /api/pending-schemas/:workspaceId endpoint. Feature #149.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Client Dashboard UI/UX Refresh
sprints.rationale: Address information overload in client portal. Progressive disclosure, unified visual hierarchy, and strategic prioritization to reduce cognitive load and improve actionability.

items.title: StrategyTab redesign — accordion sections, health score, reduced gradients
items.notes: Shipped — Added Strategy Health Score (0-100) at top with 3 sub-scores (Content Gaps 40%, Quick Wins 30%, Coverage 30%). Converted all sections to accordions with only Content Opportunities expanded by default. Removed competing gradient backgrounds — all sections now use consistent bg-zinc-900/border-zinc-800.

items.title: StrategyTab refinements — View all buttons, keyword visibility, helper text
items.notes: Shipped — Fixed 'View all' buttons to use expandedCounts state and actually expand lists. Added primary keyword display to Growth Opportunities cards. Added clarifying helper text under Keyword Opportunities ('Additional keywords your existing pages could target') and Competitor Gaps ('Keywords your competitors rank for that you don't'). Page Keyword Map now shows '+X more' indicator for secondary keywords.

items.title: StrategyTab v2 — Card-based command center
items.notes: Shipped — Complete redesign from accordion-based to card-based command center. 1) Top Summary Bar: 3 action cards (Content Gaps | Quick Wins | Growth Opportunities) with counts and CTAs that jump to sections. 2) Content Opportunities: Removed rationale truncation (show full text), show first 4 in 2-col grid with 'View all' toggle for even columns. 3) Growth Opportunities: Transformed from list to 3-up card grid with smart CTAs based on difficulty/impressions (Optimize to Rank/Build Authority/Expand Content/Quick Win). 4) Consolidated Reference Data: Quick Wins, Keyword Opportunities, Target Keywords, Competitor Gaps, Page Map now in single collapsed 'Reference Data' section. Reduced click fatigue, clearer actions, better scanability.

items.title: HealthTab redesign — Card-based command center
items.notes: Shipped v2 — Complete card-based redesign: 1) Health Score summary at top with 1-sentence status, 2) Page Speed card fully expanded (CWV mobile/desktop side-by-side), 3) Two-column layout: 'Fix These First' list (top 5 prioritized issues) | Page Cards (top 3 worst pages with click-to-expand), 4) Site-Wide Issues as compact conditional banner, 5) History & Details in single collapsed accordion. Removed FixRecommendations and OrderStatus from this tab. Removed all nested accordions. Clients can now scan→decide→act without clicking through sections.

items.title: HealthTab redesign — Card-based command center
items.notes: Shipped v2 — Complete card-based redesign: 1) Health Score summary at top with 1-sentence status, 2) Page Speed card fully expanded (CWV mobile/desktop side-by-side), 3) Two-column layout: 'Fix These First' list (top 5 prioritized issues) | Page Cards (top 3 worst pages with click-to-expand), 4) Site-Wide Issues as compact conditional banner, 5) History & Details in single collapsed accordion. Removed FixRecommendations and OrderStatus from this tab. Removed all nested accordions. Clients can now scan→decide→act without clicking through sections.

items.title: SearchTab redesign — insight-first, tables secondary
items.notes: Shipped — Analytics Hub redesign. InsightCards prominent on Overview tab, queries/pages tables in Search Performance detail tab, annotations as timeline markers on chart + CRUD section. Replaced separate SearchConsole + GoogleAnalytics pages with unified AnalyticsHub.

items.title: Strategy Keywords — Two-zone flat list + keyword detail drawer
items.notes: Shipped — Replaced sortable 7-column table with accordion expand with a two-zone flat list (confirmed above, suggestions below) and a slide-in detail drawer. Suggestion rows use blue-tinted styling (bg-blue-500/5 border border-blue-500/20). Drawer shows metrics strip, AI rationale, signals chips, next move with CTA. Mobile renders as bottom sheet. Role badge coloring: content=emerald, page=blue, strategy=teal, idea=zinc/muted. KD coloring: ≤29=emerald, 30–49=amber, ≥50=red. Trend coloring: rising=emerald-400, declining=red-400, stable=muted. No sort controls. Pipeline correctness + drawer redesign (May 2026 follow-up): (1) computeOpportunityScore returns undefined (not 0) for unenriched keywords. (2) Content gap filter keeps all keywords including volume=0; three-bucket sort: positive-volume first, unenriched null second, zero-volume last. (3) Site enrichment cap raised 15→30. (4) Background DataForSEO enrichment fires when tracked keyword added via client portal (POST /api/public/tracked-keywords/:workspaceId). (5) enrichmentStatus field (enriched/partial/unenriched) computed in buildKeywordRow and drives three drawer states: gathering (pulsing dot), partial (any signal), enriched (full metrics). (6) Drawer rebuilt: plain-English metrics via fmtAudience/fmtCompetition/fmtMomentum helpers; foldable 'See the numbers' raw data section. (7) Confirmed rows: role indicator dots (emerald/blue/teal, aria-hidden). (8) Suggestion rows: left-edge blue accent bar scaled by opportunity score.
